t_ch: 这杯「安神浓茶」入喉令你食道作痛，但火辣的焦灼感很快便消失，你感觉这茶变得温和起来，令你有种似曾相识感。
t_en: As you gulp down the Nerve Soothing Tea, the spiciness tickles your throat, but the burning sensation soon fades away. The aftertaste has a more subdued flavor profile, evoking a sense of familiarity.

t_ch: 但你实在想不起来那究竟是什么，只觉得熟悉无比，亲切，又带着几分莫名的心安——
t_en: Although you can't recall precisely where the sensation comes from, you feel a sense of warmth and security enveloping you, like a feeling of déjà vu...

t_ch: 你刚喝完这杯茶没多久，便睡着了。
t_en: You fall asleep almost as soon as you finish this cup of tea.
Um...

t_ch: 嘻…嘿！嘿嘿！
t_en: Hehe... Heh! Heh, heh!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}你没事吧？你这怎么喝完就睡着了，睡就睡吧还说梦话，这也忒……
t_en: Are you all right, {NICKNAME}? You fell asleep right after drinking the tea, and you were even talking in your sleep. This is just...

t_ch: …总算是醒了，刚才喊了你半天也没能叫醒你。
t_en: ...But thankfully, you've woken up. I've been shaking you for quite a while.

t_ch: 怎么样，我看你似乎没什么大碍，你要是感觉好点了，且跟我说说口感如何，喝完是否还有哪里不舒服，我好调整下配方。
t_en: If nothing's wrong with you, could you let me know how it tastes, or if you're still feeling uncomfortable so that I can adjust the recipe accordingly?

t_ch: 我才刚睡醒，没什么印象了。
t_en: I've just woken up and don't remember anything.

t_ch: 味道不错，喝完后会莫名昏睡…
t_en: It tastes good, but somehow it makes me feel drowsy...

t_ch: 哎哟，本来我瞧着你喝下去的表情估摸着这次肯定稳了。没想到这道新品竟有令人昏睡的副作用。
t_en: Alas, I thought this tea would work when I saw how serene your face looked, but I didn't expect it to cause drowsiness.

t_ch: 奇怪了，我自己尝的时候就没事。难道是体质问题？你该不会是什么敏感肌敏感胃吧？
t_en: But why did nothing happen when I tried it myself? Are you sensitive to certain ingredients?

t_ch: 算了算了，我回头再研究看看，总之今日之事真是…实在抱歉哈。
t_en: Ah, forget it. I'll look into it later. Anyway... I'm really sorry about all this.

t_ch: 说好的报酬你收好，今日这茶不太行，等我研发出靠谱的新品了再喊你。
t_en: Here's the compensation I promised. This tea isn't up to par today, it seems. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: Did you want something?

t_ch: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
t_en: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

t_ch: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
t_en: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

t_ch: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
t_en: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

t_ch: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
t_en: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

t_ch: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
t_en: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

t_ch: 喝就完事了！
t_en: Bottoms up!

t_ch: 这杯茶入口冰凉无比，似冰涧下的寒凉泉水，在你的全身游走。你确信它也是「烈焰浓茶」的其中一种——
t_en: This cup of tea tastes chillingly cold, like a cold spring under the ice, coursing through your entire body. You are certain that it's a variation of the Flaming Potent Tea because...

t_ch: 盖因你看见自己衣着单薄地匍匐在贝洛伯格的郊外积雪中，寒风如刀，刮得你脸疼心也作痛，你被冻得瑟瑟发抖。
t_en: You envision yourself crawling through the snow in the suburbs of Belobog, dressed in thin clothes. The frigid wind slices through you like a dagger, causing pain to shoot through your skin and your soul.

t_ch: 某款滞销的碳酸饮料曾记录过这种冷彻心扉的感受：「冷彻心扉！比每一天都没有人爱你还要冷。」这下你知道这款饮料为何滞销了。
t_en: An advertisement for a certain carbonated beverage once described this feeling as "Cold to the bone! Colder than staying unloved and alone with each passing day." After that description, it doesn't take much to understand why this product didn't sell so well.

t_ch: 怎么样，这「忘情茶」口感如何？可还有哪些地方需要改进？
t_en: How does this Unsen-tea-mental Tea taste? Is there any room for improvement?

t_ch: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
t_en: What's the name of this tea again?

t_ch: 「忘情茶」啊，立意深远，讲究一个太上忘情的物理体验。我将这个玄而又玄的哲学概念与「烈焰浓茶」结合，是不是很酷？
t_en: Unsen-tea-mental Tea — sounds really profound, right? The name emphasizes an esoteric philosophical concept and fits perfectly with the taste of my Flaming Potent Tea. That's a pretty cool idea, isn't it?

t_ch: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
t_en: What's the name of this tea again?

t_ch: 我刚刚说了啊，就叫「忘情茶」啊。
t_en: I just told you — Unsen-tea-mental Tea.

t_ch: 「忘情」是一种怎么样的体验…
t_en: What's it like to experience "Unsen"...?

t_ch: 这得问你啊，你不是才喝完吗？
t_en: That's for you to tell me. Didn't you just taste it?

t_ch: 你怎么回事，问你半天反应这么奇怪。该不会是喝完茶有什么不良反应了吧？
t_en: You're acting weird. Is everything okay? Did the tea give you any side effects?

t_ch: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
t_en: What's the name of this tea again?

t_ch: 你刚刚不是才问过？别复读了行吗？
t_en: Hey, didn't you just ask that question? Don't make me repeat the tea name over and over, all right?

t_ch: 茶？什么茶？
t_en: Tea? What tea are you talking about?

t_ch: 就是你刚刚喝的茶啊！
t_en: The tea you just drank, of course!

t_ch: 不对劲，你怎么连我刚刚说了好几次的东西都记不住？等等，「忘情茶」里我不过是放了些薄荷，怎么你反应这么强烈……
t_en: No, something is definitely wrong. You don't even remember what I just repeated several times. All I added to the tea was some peppermint, so why are you having this kind of reaction...?

t_ch: 我…忘情了？
t_en: Did I... forget anything?

t_ch: 这算哪门子「太上忘情」啊，你这明明是短暂失忆了！
t_en: "Forget" anything? You hardly remember anything!

t_ch: 难道我薄荷过敏？
t_en: Am I allergic to peppermint?

t_ch: 不可能，你身上又没有过敏反应。
t_en: I don't think so. You're not showing any allergic reactions.

t_ch: 唔，莫不是我薄荷脑放多了所致……
t_en: Hmm... maybe I added too much peppermint...?

t_ch: 算了算了，我回头再研究看看。这茶令你出现短暂失忆的副作用了，实在抱歉。
t_en: Whatever, I'll look into it later. I'm really sorry for the memory loss side effect it caused.

t_ch: 说好的报酬你收好，今日这茶不太行，等我研发出靠谱的新品了再喊你。
t_en: Here's the compensation I promised. This tea isn't up to par today, it seems. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: Did you want something?

t_ch: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
t_en: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

t_ch: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
t_en: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

t_ch: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
t_en: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

t_ch: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
t_en: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

t_ch: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
t_en: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

t_ch: 喝就完事了！
t_en: Bottoms up!

t_ch: 这果然是货真价实的「烈焰浓茶」，虽然你尚未知晓杜老板究竟在里头加了什么配料，但那霸道的辛辣与刺激感直冲你的天灵盖。
t_en: While you have no idea what ingredients Boss Du added, you are certain that this is the authentic Flaming Potent Tea as its overwhelming spice and burn go straight to your brain.

t_ch: 茶水下肚，强烈的冲击感令你顿时愣住，在摇摇头冷静了数息后，你开始掐着指头计算自己方才究竟喝了几杯「烈焰浓茶」——且慢，你猛然想到，掐着指头计算分明是三月七的行为。
t_en: You are stunned by the Flaming Potent Tea's bold aftertaste. After shaking your head and taking a moment to compose yourself, you start counting on your fingers how many cups of Flaming Potent Tea you've had. At that moment, you suddenly realize that counting with your fingers is something only March 7th would do.

t_ch: 你连忙收起手指，但你继而又想到——三月七数手指是因为她有十根手指头，那么帕姆究竟是如何数指头的呢？从一数到二，还是从零数到零？
t_en: You quickly curl your fingers, but then you start to wonder: March 7th counts her fingers because she has ten of them, but how does Pom-Pom count their fingers? Do they start at one and count up to two, or start at zero and end at zero, too?

t_ch: 你自觉沉浸在分析手指计数的数学理论中不可自拔……
t_en: You become completely absorbed in your finger-counting mathematical theories...

t_ch: （我这是在哪儿，刚刚明明还在杜氏茶庄那儿喝茶，怎么就跑这儿来了。杜老板说不定还在找我呢，还是赶紧回去吧！）
t_en: (Wait, where am I? I was having tea at Du's Teahouse, but why am I here? Boss Du might be looking for me. I should hurry back!)

t_ch: 刚刚喝的茶？
t_en: What was the tea I just tried?

t_ch: 哎哟，总算把你给盼回来了。吓死我了。你喝完茶就急着要走，我还以为你嫌这茶太难喝直接拂袖而去呢！
t_en: Oh, finally, you're back! I was so worried about you. You finished the tea and just stormed out — I thought you were irritated by it!

t_ch: 我怎么劝你都不好使，只听见你一直在念叨什么…什么「宇宙的终极」「数字的真理」之类的，反正都是我听不懂的词儿！
t_en: I tried to calm you down, but all you muttered was something about the "ultimate truth of the universe" and "the unified theory of maths." At any rate, I didn't understand a word!

t_ch: 而且走起路来脚步虚浮，一路跌跌撞撞的——哦我看你现在好像没受伤，没出事就好。
t_en: You were walking unsteadily and stumbling, but now I see that you are safe and sound. I'm glad that nothing terrible happened.

t_ch: …所以，我调的那杯茶，你喝完觉得如何？若是真的太难喝把你气跑了，我先给你赔个不是。
t_en: ...So, how did you feel about that cup of tea? I'm sincerely sorry if it was a bad tasting experience.

t_ch: 感觉好像很容易上头…
t_en: It's a little overwhelming...

t_ch: 刚才发生的事我自己都不知道。
t_en: I don't even know what just happened.

t_ch: 嗯？听你的描述，我怎么感觉你是因为喝「烈焰浓茶」喝得有点上头了呀？我见过一些客人，他们耐受力比较低，喝完就头晕脑胀胡言乱语的。
t_en: Hmmm? From what you're saying, I assume the Flaming Potent Tea has got you a little carried away? I've seen customers who aren't used to it getting dizzy and talking nonsense after drinking my tea.

t_ch: 听起来有点像你刚才的症状…这么说来，是因为「烈焰浓茶」太「燃」了，看来我得重新调整下配比了。
t_en: Perhaps that's why you acted weird... Looks like the Flaming Potent Tea was a bit too flaming and potent. I'll have to adjust the recipe.

t_ch: 那回头再研究看看，哦对了，说好的报酬你收好，我得调整下配方了，回头出新品了再喊你。
t_en: I'll look into it later. Oh, and here's the compensation I promised. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: Did you want something?

t_ch: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
t_en: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

t_ch: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
t_en: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

t_ch: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
t_en: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

t_ch: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
t_en: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

t_ch: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
t_en: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

t_ch: 喝就完事了！
t_en: Bottoms up!

t_ch: 你接过这杯茶，徐徐喝下，你的内心很平静，这一路走来你见过无数匪夷所思的事，区区一杯茶，如何能令你的心湖波澜再起？
t_en: You accept the cup of tea and slowly drink it. Your mind remains calm — you have had your fair share of bizarre encounters on your journey, and how could a cup of tea possibly surprise you now?

t_ch: 温润的液体入喉顺滑无比，带有几分暖意，你的嘴角不禁挂上几丝笑意，准备提前恭喜杜老板的新品研究又取得了重大进展。
t_en: The warm liquid goes down your throat smoothly, and its comforting warmth causes the corners of your lips to curl into a smile. You're about to congratulate Boss Du on his progress with his new recipe.

t_ch: 但你正要张嘴，却看到了杜老板的头顶与脑后，几处被发丝横向平躺以夹子并拢的空白刺痛了你的双眼。
t_en: However, before you can say anything, you are taken aback by the sight of a few areas on Boss Du's head that are already showing signs of balding.

t_ch: 「烈焰浓茶」新品的研发，看起来只是喝杯茶的功夫，谁能想到杜老板在背后竟付出了如此艰难的牺牲，竟要以牺牲头发为代价，着实令你感叹不已。
t_en: Developing the new Flaming Potent Tea seemed as simple as adding some random ingredients, but you didn't realize that Boss Du was so committed that he even sacrificed his hair. You are impressed by his perseverance.

t_ch: 你看见杜老板正用极为期盼的目光盯着你，你一直未开口，他的耳后冒出涔涔汗珠，不知是紧张，是急，亦或者对你办事不靠谱的负面情绪……
t_en: Boss Du looks at you with expectant eyes, but you remain silent. At that moment, you notice beads of sweat emerging behind his ears, and you are unsure if he's nervous, anxious, or lacks confidence in your competency...

t_ch: 但你为何能看见他耳朵后面的汗水？没由来地想到这一点，你忽地收回了所有思绪，背后直冒冷汗。
t_en: But why can you see the sweat behind his ears? As you ponder this question, your thoughts come to an abrupt halt, and a cold shiver runs down your spine.

t_ch: …呃？那个，你感觉如何？口感还可以吗？
t_en: ...Eh? A—Are you all right? How do you like the tea?

t_ch: 你刚刚不是耳后冒汗了？
t_en: Didn't you just get sweaty behind your ears?

t_ch: 呃，今天衣服穿得有些多，我家里人非跟我说得加件秋衣保暖，没办法，让你见笑——且慢，我方才出了这么多汗吗，连你都看到了……
t_en: Umm, perhaps it's because I'm wearing thick clothes today as my family insists that it's cold outside. Have I been sweating so much that you've noticed...?

t_ch: 失礼了失礼了，请见谅。
t_en: Well, please forgive me. It's not professional to sweat so much in front of customers.

t_ch: 老板你头发掉得有点多啊…
t_en: Looks like you've experienced some hair loss...

t_ch: 最近的确一直在熬夜，每天梳头都看到掉一大把头发——且慢，你、你怎么知道的？
t_en: That's true. I have been staying up late these days, and I've been experiencing terrible hair loss every day when I... W—wait! H—How did you find it out?

t_ch: 抱歉刚刚走神了。
t_en: Sorry, I just got lost in thought.

t_ch: 没关系，你先慢慢想，我不急的。
t_en: It's okay. Just take your time. I'm not in a hurry anyway.

t_ch: 方才…是发生了什么事吗？
t_en: Did something... just happen?

t_ch: （告知你刚才看到的一切）
t_en: (Tell him what you just saw.)

t_ch: 原来如此，看来这应该是喝茶之后带来的某种副作用，产生了一些奇异的致幻效果。
t_en: I see. It appears that the tea has caused some sort of hallucination as a side effect.

t_ch: 呵呵，我压根就没掉头发，刚刚也没紧张，所以肯定是幻觉。
t_en: Well, I wasn't feeling nervous, and of course I didn't lose my hair at all. That must have been a hallucination.

t_ch: 这么说来，这方子有问题，得再调整下配方了。哦对了，这报酬答应你的，你收好，回头等我捣鼓出新品了再喊你。
t_en: In any case, something is wrong with this recipe, and I'll have to adjust it. Oh, here's the promised compensation. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

t_ch: 你找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: Did you want something?

t_ch: 最近我偶然得到些灵感，先连以滋补药材和新鲜蔬果为配料，栽了好些跟头，好不容易才捣鼓出新的配方。
t_en: Lately, I've been trying to make something new with fresh herbs, vegetables, and fruits. After some setbacks, I've finally developed a new recipe.

t_ch: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
t_en: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

t_ch: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
t_en: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

t_ch: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
t_en: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

t_ch: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
t_en: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

t_ch: 喝就完事了！
t_en: Bottoms up!

t_ch: 这茶似乎没什么特殊的，入口有些辛辣，但喝起来也就那回事。不甜也不酸，不苦也不咸，有色且透光，仅此而已。
t_en: It appears that this tea lacks any distinctive features. It has a mildly spicy taste at first, but then it fades away. It's not too sweet, sour, bitter, or salty — not much else to say about it.

t_ch: 你耐着心观察了片刻，确认的确没出现什么异样。
t_en: You wait patiently for a while to make sure you're not experiencing any abnormal side effects.

t_ch: 怎么样？好喝吗？口感上你觉得还有什么问题吗？身体上呢？有没有不舒服的地方？
t_en: How does it taste? Good? Any room for improvement? Are you experiencing any discomfort?

t_ch: 无功无过吧。
t_en: Not bad, but there's not much else to say about it.

t_ch: 好像没什么特别的…
t_en: Nothing special, I guess...

t_ch: 是吗？没有副作用那说明配方是靠谱的，接下来可能就是得调整下口感了。
t_en: Oh, really? If you're not experiencing any side effects, it means the recipe is usable. Next I'll adjust its flavor.

t_ch: 唔，容我想想还能再加点什么进去呢……
t_en: Hmm... let's see, what else should I add...
*burp*
*burp* *burp*

t_ch: ？什么情况？
t_en: Hmm? What's happening?

t_ch: 我也不知道嗝。
t_en: I don't know, either. *burp*

t_ch: 抱歉是我打嗝了嗝嗝。
t_en: Nothing. I just *burp* hiccuped. *burp* *burp*

t_ch: 可能刚刚喝得急嗝嗝嗝。
t_en: Maybe I drank it too fast. *burp* *burp* *burp*

t_ch: 我瞧你这情况才出现没多久啊，喝之前还好好的，感觉应该是配方里的碳酸气体加多了。
t_en: You only started burping after having the tea. Maybe I added too much carbonated gas.

t_ch: 哎哟，也怪我，为了追求口感加了这么多…得再调整下配方了。哦对了，这报酬答应你的，你收好，回头等我捣鼓出新品了再喊你。
t_en: Oh, my bad. I shouldn't have added so much carbonated gas just for the taste... Guess I'll have to adjust the recipe again. Oh, here's the promised compensation. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

t_ch: 巨大的，紫色的…看周围的环境来猜测，这应该是颗大地兽的蛋。
t_en: Giant, purple... From your surroundings, you guess that this should be a dromas egg.

t_ch: 砰咚、砰咚，你能感受到它在脉动，好像随着你的抚摸加快了速率。
t_en: You can feel its pulse beating, seemingly accelerating with your touch.

t_ch: 如果这是一个有开锁器和盗窃技能树的开放世界游戏，也许你可以调查一下里面是不是藏着一些利衡币。
t_en: If this was an open-world game with lockpicks and a thief's ability tree, you might be able to reveal if there was any Balance Coins stashed within.

t_ch: 据说将这种漂亮的宝箱摆在家中的显眼之处，会有效增加自己被盗的概率。有意思的是，在名为「元老院」的机构中，会有人出于不可告人的目的，故意去这么做。
t_en: It is said that such beautiful chests displayed in conspicuous spots at home serve to increase the chances of being burglarized. What's interesting is that in the organization of the supposed Council of Elders, there are those who would — for clandestine purposes — intentionally do this.

t_ch: 随着文明的进步，精致的浮雕总是会取代质朴的岩画。为什么人们就不喜欢在凯旋门上多画点小动物呢？
t_en: With the advance of civilization, exquisite reliefs would replace primitive rock drawings. Why don't people like drawings of small animals over their triumphal arch?

t_ch: 长久以来，奥赫玛应该都是一个四季如春的城市…至少雕塑上的人们穿得都很清凉。
t_en: Since a long time ago, Okhema should have been a city of eternal spring... A fortuitous phenomenon, for the statues are dressed lightly.

t_ch: 相比于紫红色的斑岩，白色的石灰岩无疑是一种雕刻成本更低的材料…但也更容易被雨水侵蚀。它会在未来的黑潮中幸存下来吗？你不知道。
t_en: Compared to the rock mottled in purple and red, the white limestone is indubitably a more economical sculpting material... but is also more susceptible to erosion from rainwater. Will it survive the future black tide? You don't know.

t_ch: 这些石灰岩似乎并不产自奥赫玛本地…奇怪，这里的人们为什么没有尝试使用红土作为建筑材料呢？是因为都用做大地兽的饲料了吗？
t_en: These limestones do not seem to be of Okheman origin... Strange, why do the people here not experiment with using red clay as a construction material? Is it because it has all been used as dromas feed?

t_ch: 壁画
t_en: Mural

t_ch: 在高塔上仰望星空——这是与当今的翁法罗斯彻底无缘的古代情景。某一日，神明不再游弋于天空，于是人们失去了日月和繁星…当地人好像是这么说的。
t_en: Gazing at the starry sky atop the high tower — an ancient sight that the present Amphoreus will never know. One day, the gods traversed the skies no longer, and thus people lost their sun, moon and stars... That's what the natives say.

t_ch: 一般来说，有着鸟类身体结构的动物更擅长在白昼行动——猫头鹰等个案除外。这副壁画的构图似乎是一个旁证，说明翁法罗斯人真的很久没有见过自然的黑夜与白昼。
t_en: Typically speaking, animals with avian anatomy are diurnal — apart from owls. This mural's composition appears to be supporting evidence that Amphoreans really have not seen the natural day and night cycles for a long time.

t_ch: 瀑布
t_en: Waterfall

t_ch: 类似山中别墅的景致，让你时常忘记这里是一座修建在云端的城市。奥赫玛的水来自何方，又最终会流向哪里？这个问题的答案也许只有法吉娜自己知道。
t_en: Scenery reminiscent of a mountain villa, often making you forget that this is a city built atop clouds. Where does Okhema's water come from, and where does it eventually flow? Perhaps only Phagousa knows the answer to this question.

t_ch: 尽管宇宙中的人们彼此生活的环境千差万别，但他们对自然风光的审美却出人意料地一致——甚至在翁法罗斯这个与外部几无瓜葛的世界，人们喜爱的也是流水、假山、绿植……
t_en: Even if the lives of people dwelling in the universe are light-years apart, their aesthetics towards nature's sights are surprisingly similar — even on a secluded world like Amphoreus, severed from external communications, its people still favor flowing water, faux mountains, and verdant flora...

t_ch: …不过这也说不上有多么奇怪。自然选择的压力让宇宙中的生命形式无法像梦境中那样荒诞——那只无形的手，当然也会影响到各个星球上的审美。
t_en: ...Not that's anything strange. The pressure of natural selection prevents universal lifeforms from absurd evolution evolving into fantastic renditions as seen in dreams — of course, that invisible hand also guides the aesthetics of every planet.

t_ch: 不过还是好想见识见识十六条腿的外星人啊。
t_en: Though you still hope to meet an alien with sixteen legs.

t_ch: 「贼之手」铺子的广告牌，「经营范围广阔，只要利衡币足够，甚至能借来泰坦的权能」——至少宣传是这么宣传的。不过，挂着这种店名还有谁会进去？执法人员吗？
t_en: The Thief's Hand shop's signboard. "With a diverse portfolio, as long as you have enough Balance Coins, you can even borrow the Titan's authority" — Is how it promotes its business. But who would even want to enter a shop with such a name? Law enforcement?

t_ch: 「蛊惑之手」的广告牌，设计者想表达的思路一目了然——趁着你目光被吸引住的工夫，扎格列斯就会把你的钱包顺走。
t_en: The Bewitching Hands' signboard. The designer's thought processes are clear — while your eyes are distracted, Zagreus would pilfer your purse.

t_ch: 此处日色正好、气氛宜人，鲜果与秘酿齐备，只待一位有缘人来消磨一段慵懒的时光。
t_en: The sun here is just nice, soaked in a pleasant vibe, fresh fruit and ambrosia galore, awaiting that one fated person to while away idyllic moments.

t_ch: 在奥赫玛，无论是人们还是城市本身，都仿佛已经习惯了将自己沉浸于慵懒与闲适之中。
t_en: In Okhema, be it her people or the city herself, it is as if all have become accustomed to the immersion of indolence and leisure.

t_ch: 在房檐上摆放如此多的杂物，当真不存在安全隐患吗？
t_en: Placing so many knick-knacks along the eaves of the house... are they not a safety hazard?

t_ch: 你觉得应当在下方竖起一个标牌：「当心高空坠物」。
t_en: You feel that a sign should be erected below: "Beware of falling objects."

t_ch: 「金丝裁缝铺」
t_en: "Golden Thread Tailor"

t_ch: 「本店出售各类布匹、制定成衣。」
t_en: "We sell all kinds of fabric and tailored garments."

t_ch: 「果蔬摊」
t_en: "Fruit and Veg Store"

t_ch: 「本店只提供最新鲜的果蔬。」
t_en: "We only provide the freshest of fruits and greens."

t_ch: 位于云石市集中黄金地段的民宅，平日里无论出行还是采买都无比便利，就是可能会有点吵。
t_en: A residence in prime Marmoreal Market estate, conveniently located for daily travel and shopping, though it can get a bit noisy at times.

t_ch: 请不要再试图向内窥探了——毕竟你的定位并不是那种会闯进NPC家中肆意搜刮的屠龙勇者，对吧？
t_en: Do not attempt to peer inside anymore — You're not some dragonslaying hero who barges into NPC homes and ransacks their belongings, are you?

t_ch: 餐厅的侧门——里面或许是私人民宅、又或许是厨房重地，但总归闲人免进。
t_en: The side door to a diner — there may be a private residence within, or perhaps a kitchen. Whatever it is, it's off-limits to trespassers.

t_ch: 千万不要试图偷偷溜进去，毕竟这家餐厅的老板扔你就像掷铁饼一样轻松。
t_en: Do not attempt to sneak in, considering that the boss of this diner is physically capable of hauling you off your feet and tossing you to the streets like they would a discus.

t_ch: 「云石餐厅」
t_en: "Marmoreal Diner"

t_ch: 「请理性点餐，避免浪费。」
t_en: "Please order prudently to avoid food waste."

t_ch: 「藏书所」
t_en: "Librarium"

t_ch: 「本店提供试阅服务，但请爱护石板和卷轴。」
t_en: "We provide sample books for reading, but please be careful with our tablets and scrolls."

t_ch: 「西塔罗斯古玩店」
t_en: "Theodoros' Antiques"

t_ch: 「『黄金裔』系列暂无现货，新款双耳罐绝赞发售中。」
t_en: "'Chrysos Heir' products have temporarily been sold out. Our latest amphoras are now on sale."

t_ch: 「哈托努斯的锻造房」
t_en: "Chartonus' Forge"

t_ch: 「断造、修里、打摩，乒器、凯甲、工巨，卖、定制，回收。」…其他的你也看不懂了。
t_en: "Forging, repairs, grinding, weaponry, armors, tools, selling, custom products, recycling." ...You don't recognize the rest of the words.

t_ch: 火焰在炉中劈啪作响，燥热滚烫。多亏山之民那结实的皮肉与强韧的体魄，否则一般人怕是很难长时间忍受如此高热的环境。
t_en: The blazing furnace crackles with flames, scorching intensely. It is fortunate that Mountain Dwellers have hardy skin and tenacious constitution — the average person would be unable to withstand such a blistering environment for a long time.

t_ch: 曾有人对铁匠如此调侃：「若是哪天『黎明机器」』熄灭了，你们店里的锻造炉怕不就成了整个奥赫玛最亮的东西」。铁匠只是笑笑，并未作答。
t_en: Someone once mocked the blacksmith: "If there comes a day the Dawn Device goes dark, your forge's furnace would be the brightest thing in all of Okhema." The blacksmith only smiled in silent response.

t_ch: 大部分武器和盔甲的确坚固耐用，但每块金属都有它的极限。如果发现它们即将破损了，记得及时来哈托努斯的铁匠铺修复。
t_en: Most of the weapons and armor are indeed sturdy and durable, but every piece of metal has its limits. If you notice your armaments about to wear down, don't forget to bring them to Chartonus' blacksmith shop for repairs.

t_ch: 武器最好的一点就是…它们永远都不会背叛你。
t_en: The best thing about weapons is... they will never betray you.

t_ch: 此处离天空很近，虽然看不到「晨昏之眼，艾格勒」，但你可以在这里俯瞰整个奥赫玛的风景。
t_en: This place is very close to the sky. You can't see Aquila, the Eye of Twilight, but you have a scenic view that overlooks Okhema.

t_ch: 垂眼间你只见栏杆上一行模糊的小字：「前有绝景，所以跳跃很有用」。
t_en: A glance downwards, and you see a blurred line of text on the railing: "Breathtaking view ahead, jumping is useful."

t_ch: 听说有些「赤陶学派」的学者在此尝试什么「信仰之跃」，也不知道那些人最后成功了没有。
t_en: You hear that some Erythrokeramist scholars attempted a "leap of faith" of some sort here, but you don't know if anyone succeeded eventually.

t_ch: 修复后的雕像在阳光下闪烁着温润的光泽，仿佛从未破碎过。就连时间也不愿看到美的事物蒙尘，或许这就是欧洛尼斯留给世人最后的慈悲。
t_en: The refurbished statue glimmers under the warm sunlight, as if good as new. Even time is reluctant to lay its dust upon such a magnificent article, or perhaps this is Oronyx' final act of benevolence bequeathed unto humanity.

t_ch: 你站在修复的雕像前出神。人们总说时光一去不复回，可在这里，连破碎的雕像都能重获新生。
t_en: You stand before the restored statue in a mesmerized daze. People always say time can never return, but here, even a broken statue can be given a lease of new life.

t_ch: 在翁法罗斯的民间传说中，人们会把艾格勒的寒风装进法吉娜的机关中制成冰柩，为自己的食物保鲜降温。
t_en: Among Amphoreus' folklore, people would stash Aquila's chilly winds into Phagousa's device to create a freezer that could keep their food fresh.

t_ch: 浴场的存冰室，低温浴池的浴液似乎出自于此。法吉娜的祝福让冷冻浴液始终保持着最佳的温度。
t_en: The ice storage room of the baths. Bath liquid in low-temperature pools apparently comes from here. Phagousa's graces allow frozen liquid to maintain its optimal temperature.

t_ch: 你凑近观察，冰块表面的水雾模糊了你的视线——说起来，这些冰块真的只是用来存放浴液的吗？不知为何你总觉得里面似乎有东西在动，或许是低温环境带来的错觉……
t_en: You inch closer to observe, the mist from the icy surface fogging up your vision. Say, are these ice blocks really just used to store bath liquid? You can't shake the feeling that something's moving inside — perhaps the low temperature is causing your eyes to deceive you...

t_ch: 毛巾架上摆放着洁白的浴巾，你伸手轻抚，意外地发现每条毛巾都带着水汽——这让你想起浴场里流传的笑话：在法吉娜的神殿里，就连毛巾也不愿意保持干燥，这就是艾格勒与法吉娜关系不和的来源。
t_en: Clean white towels are draped over the towel racks. You graze them lightly, surprisingly realizing that every towel is wet to the touch. You recall a joke that regularly makes its rounds in the baths: In Phagousa's temple, even towels aren't willing to stay dry — this is the origin of Aquila and Phagousa's terse relations.

t_ch: 传说中用法吉娜赐福过的泉水浸染的毛巾，能吸走一切污秽与疲惫。不过在看到旁边写着「乱丢毛巾罚款五十利衡币」的字样后，你觉得这些毛巾吸走的恐怕是钱包。
t_en: Legend has it that using a towel doused in Phagousa-blessed springwater can absorb all taint and fatigue. But reading the warning sign beside that writes "<unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coin fine for intentional misplacement of towels," you reckon that your purse is what these towels will absorb instead.

t_ch: 浴场方号称被法吉娜赐福过的毛巾，遇水膨胀…像一摞整齐的方砖被摆放至此。泰坦伟力，神奇至极——尽管你觉得这玩意和星际和平公司贩卖的压缩毛巾没什么区别。
t_en: Towels that the baths claim to be blessed by Phagousa. They expand when in contact with water... and are placed here like a neat stack of tiles. The Titans' powers are truly wondrous — even if you think that these things are no different from the compression towels that the IPC sells.

t_ch: 黑底金纹的大门，与浴场轻松休闲的氛围格格不入，只有尊贵的客人到来时才会开启。
t_en: A black door with gold trimmings stands in stark contrast to the baths' leisurely atmosphere — it only opens for the most esteemed of guests when they arrive.

t_ch: 浴场在装修上花了不少心思，就连大门中央的圆形纹饰都有讲究——融合了法吉娜的酒杯印记与雅努斯的门扉缩影，暗示着「一杯入喉，万径通达」的翁法罗斯民间谚语。
t_en: The baths have been painstakingly renovated. Even the circular patterns in the center of the main door have its meaning, combining Phagousa's goblet insignia with a mini design of Janus' doorway — a clever composition alluding to the Amphorean idiom of "a cup down the throat opens myriad paths."

t_ch: 架子上摆放着精致的杯盘与点心，但所有食物都纹丝未动——看来连最尊贵的客人也无法同时享用这么多美食，这或许就是法吉娜教导世人知足的方式。
t_en: Exquisite cups, plates, and delicacies line the shelves, but all the food has remained thoroughly untouched — it seems that even the most distinguished guests aren't able to indulge in such luxuriant fare simultaneously. Perhaps it is Phagousa's way of teaching temperance to the people.

t_ch: 精美的点心与盛放佳酿的水晶杯在架子上无人问津，有时候，最奢侈的不是享用它们的机会，而是拒绝它们的勇气。
t_en: The gorgeous delicacies and crystal goblets filled with the finest wine sit ignored on their shelves. Sometimes, what is most extravagant isn't the opportunity to enjoy their offerings, but the courage to decline them.

t_ch: 显然不是单人分量的美食与佳酿，你忍不住想起了列车组的伙伴——三月七要是在就好了，这些显然都是她爱吃的东西。
t_en: The servings of delicious cuisine and fine brew are obviously not meant for a single person. You can't help but think about your Express comrades — if only March 7th was here. These are all evidently her favorites.

t_ch: 架子上贴心地准备了蓬松柔软的枕头与毛巾，上面绣着精美的法吉娜圣徽——看来在崇敬泰坦的人们眼中，小憩片刻时也应该在内心与神对话。
t_en: Fluffy, supple pillows and towels have been thoughtfully prepared on the shelves, Phagousa's sacred emblem embroidered on all of them — it appears that to Titan-worshiping devouts, even moments of brief respite should be used to engage in inner dialogue with their gods.

t_ch: 浴袍、毛巾、枕头，甚至还有小憩时使用的薄被，浴场的准备是如此地周齐。就算丹恒想打地铺，想必也不会有着凉的烦恼。
t_en: Bathrobes, towels, pillows, even the thin blankets used during respite, the entire baths have been prepared meticulously. Dan Heng would be hard-pressed to kick up a fuss even if he wanted to sleep on the floor.

t_ch: 桌上摆着精致的糕点，旁边的躺椅上还残留着潮湿的痕迹。
t_en: Exquisite delicacies line the tables, remnant traces of dampness still lingering on the lounger beside them.

t_ch: 你正准备坐下，突然瞥见躺椅扶手上的警示牌：「请勿在未擦干身体时使用」——这大概是某位浴场管理员的惨痛教训。
t_en: Just as you prepare to sit on it, you glimpse a warning label hanging off the side of the lounger's arm: "Please dry yourself before using" — probably a painful lesson of a certain bath administrator.

t_ch: 休息区的灯光温暖而柔和，桌上的茶点似乎还冒着热气，但你很确定至少最近几时内都没人来过这里——或许法吉娜的眷顾不仅体现在她的圣水中，还包括这些永远温热的点心。
t_en: The rest area's lights are warm and cozy, meandering steam rising lazily out of the still piping-hot tea on the table. You are sure though that no one was here in the recent few hours — perhaps Phagousa's grace not only manifests in their sacred water but also in these eternally warm delicacies.

t_ch: 不愧是圣城奥赫玛，人们在泡澡这等休憩时间都不忘阅读。不知道瑟希斯知道了会作何感想：它的信徒在浴池里读书，这究竟是对法吉娜的挑衅，还是对瑟希斯献上诚挚的爱？
t_en: This is the holy city of Okhema indeed — even in their baths, her people have their heads buried in reading books. You wonder what would Cerces think if it knew: Is it a taunt on Phagousa, or a tribute of their devoted love to Cerces, that the Titan's disciples are reading in the bath?

t_ch: 你查看着躺椅上倒扣的书卷，发现那是一本《如何正确使用浴场》的玩意儿。在泡澡时看关于泡澡的书——这大概就是所谓的理论与实践完美结合。
t_en: You examine the book face-down on the lounger — it's a book titled How to Use a Bath Correctly. Reading a book about baths while in a bath... this has got to the apparent perfect fusion between theory and reality.

t_ch: 种质库
t_en: Gene Bank

t_ch: 奥赫玛的种质库，记载着末世中灭绝的物种信息。等到这趟开拓之旅结束，或许可以令它们再度重现银河——你的朋友中一定有不少对此感兴趣。
t_en: Okhema's gene bank, archived with the information of organisms that went extinct during the apocalypse. When this trailblazing expedition ends, they may, perhaps, resurface across the Cosmos once more — many among your friends will be quite interested in that.

t_ch: 门上的每轮木纹，都唱诵着它所经历的一段岁月——但也有些是大地兽和奇美拉们留下的划痕伪装出来的。
t_en: Every wooden grain on the door is an ode to the years it has endured... though some of them are patched-up works of scratches made by dromases and chimeras.

t_ch: 这片区域被提供给了学者们，用于讲学或是辩论。人们会为了奥赫玛的未来而贡献出自己的智慧——或者为了「烤肉卷饼该不该加奶酪」一事而进行言语上的激烈交锋。
t_en: This area has been allotted to the scholars for academic lectures and debates. People will contribute their own wisdom to Okhema's future... or be engaged in fervent debate on whether cheese should be placed on grilled meat wraps.

t_ch: 「老师们辛辛苦苦站着讲课，学生却慵懒地坐在台下走神，是否有些悲哀？」——这个现象在奥赫玛得到了有效改善。
t_en: "Teachers stand tirelessly, expounding their learnings, yet their students lackadaisically sit below the podium, their eyes glazed. Isn't that somewhat tragic?" This issue has been effectively improved in Okhema.

t_ch: 场地预订表上写着：「即将开讲——吉奥里亚与塞纳托斯是同位体的可能性与其论证」，旁边画着一只一脸疑惑的大地兽，还有一行「胡说八道」的批注。
t_en: Written on the venue's reservation list: "Next Lecture: The Possibility of Georios and Thanatos Being a Singular Entity and Its Argumentation". Beside it, a drawing of a dromas' doubtful face, along with a remark that reads "Balderdash."

t_ch: 挂在墙上的车厢令你们心情复杂，但既然事已至此，「开拓」前行吧！正如仙舟经典相声所言——车到山前必有路，船撞桥头自然沉——好像不太对。
t_en: The carriage hanging off the wall causes some turmoil within you, but since it's come to this, keep on "trailblazing"! As they say in classic Xianzhou's crosstalk: A road will appear when the car arrives before the mountain, and a boat will naturally sink when it hits the bridge... Hang on, that didn't sound right.

t_ch: 希望不会有某种存在突然出现，向你们追索破坏文化遗产的赔偿——毕竟这里看起来就像是公司的市场开拓部广告里会出现的地方。
t_en: You hope a certain presence doesn't suddenly pop out and demand compensation for ruining cultural relics. After all, this looks like the sort of place that would appear in an IPC Marketing Development Department ad.

t_ch: 尚未完工的靛钢雕像。根据工匠的需求，它可能成为军锋、铁卫或射手——无论哪种，最后都要投身战争。
t_en: An unfinished statue crafted from indigo steel. Depending on the craftsman's requirements, it may be sculpted into a legionnaire, a city guard, or an archer. No matter the result, it will eventually be used for war.

t_ch: 由靛钢制成的人形雕像。只要注入「纷争」的力量，它就能化身可怕的战争机器，用剑斩断一切来犯之敌——
t_en: A human statue crafted from indigo steel. Once injected with the power of Strife, it transforms into a monstrous war machine, cleaving down all its foes with its blade...

t_ch: 但大多数时候，悬锋城的泰坦眷属们会主动寻找敌人。
t_en: But most of the time, The Titankins of Castrum Kremnos will actively seek out their enemies.

t_ch: 靛石堆
t_en: Indigo Steel Pile

t_ch: 在指定区域存放的靛石堆，坚固且稀有的原材料，经由工匠之手化作千百种形态。
t_en: A pile of indigo steel deposited in a specified zone. A durable and rare raw material that can be shaped by craftsmen into myriad forms.

t_ch: 据说最开始有人想给这种材料取名叫「魂钢」，但不知为何放弃了。
t_en: It's said that in the beginning, there were some who wanted to name this material "Soulsteel," but later abandoned that notion for unknown reasons.

t_ch: 总有人把这东西误认成冰。而当「纷争」眷属砸开他们脑壳的时候，这些家伙认错也晚了。
t_en: Some would always mistake this thing for ice. And when the Strife's Titankin smashed open their skulls, they would realize their mistake too late.

t_ch: 旧日岗哨
t_en: Former Watchtower

t_ch: 卫士们的指定站岗区域，如今已无人迹。
t_en: Designated post for sentries. No one uses it now.

t_ch: 用于指引雕像巡逻、站岗的徽记，如今已失去效力。
t_en: Once used to guide statue patrols and guard posts, this emblem is now defunct.

t_ch: 曾经的铸魂区。工匠们在这里为雕像注入「纷争」的力量，驱动它向悬锋之敌挥剑。
t_en: The former Soul-Forging Zone. Here, craftsmen would inject the power of Strife into statues and have them brandish their swords against the enemies of Kremnos.

t_ch: 如今，这里既无工匠，也没有可供锻打的材料。一切都已消逝在风中。
t_en: Now, no craftsmen toil away here, nor are there materials present for forging. Everything has faded with the wind.

t_ch: 一望无际的楼梯
t_en: Infinity Stairway

t_ch: 这条楼梯向上延伸，一路通往废墟的更深处…或许没必要走那么远？
t_en: A stairway that extends upwards, all the way into the depths of the ruins... Maybe it's not really necessary to go that far?

t_ch: 冷风吹进你的领口，继续前进恐怕会有不好的事发生……
t_en: The cold wind slides down your collar — something bad might happen if you venture farther...

t_ch: 本应悬浮于空中的辅助单元，如今已失去动力、坠回地面。
t_en: A support unit that's supposed to hover in midair has since run out of power, crashing to the ground.

t_ch: 悬锋城文化的神龛，里面存放着英雄们的魂灵。
t_en: A shrine from the Castrum Kremnos culture, housing the souls of heroes within.

t_ch: 只有战死沙场的勇士才配被这种神龛供奉。据说他们会立于尼卡多利身侧，享受无尽的荣耀。
t_en: Only warriors who fall in valiant battle earn the right to be enshrined in this kind of structure. It is said they will stand alongside Nikador, basking in untold, unending glory.

t_ch: 摇铃呼叫大地兽
t_en: Call for dromas with bell

t_ch: 摇铃上镌刻着一段文字说明——「欢迎您搭乘圣城观光一号线。只要轻轻摇铃，大地兽就会停靠过来，搭载您享受一段舒适惬意的漫步时光。」
t_en: Engraved on the bell is a line of text: "Welcome to the Holy City Sightseeing Line 1. Ring the bell lightly and a dromas will stop beside you. Ride in comfort on a leisurely tour of the city's mesmerizing scenery."

t_ch: 摇。
t_en: Ring.

t_ch: 不摇。
t_en: Don't ring.

t_ch: 爬上大地兽
t_en: Climb aboard the dromas.

t_ch: 据说很多人小时候都有被父母高高举过头顶的惬意体验。如果那些家庭拥有像大地兽这样的坐骑，那孩子们应该会开心到爆吧。
t_en: It's said that many in their childhoods have experienced the exhilaration of being lifted high above their heads by their parents. If those families had a steed like the dromas, those children would've been bursting with excitement.

t_ch: 话不多说，你决定——
t_en: Enough said, you decide to...

t_ch: 爬上大地兽的后背！
t_en: Climb on the back of the dromas!

t_ch: …还是算了。
t_en: ...I'll pass.

t_ch: 如果不是用作大地兽的食物，这种粘土应该也是烧制陶器的好材料。你不禁设想，也许大地兽的肌肉其实是一种软陶…不对，软陶的主要成分好像不是无机物。
t_en: If not used as dromas feed, this clay would also make for excellent pottery material. You can't help but imagine that perhaps the dromas' flesh is also a clay of some kind... Wait, that's not right, polymer clay isn't primarily made of inorganic materials.

t_ch: 细腻而富有肌理，就像红烧肉一样…依稀记得在公司的拍卖会上，有某种古玩的卖点也是如此。不知道从翁法罗斯出去之后，你能不能为它也附加上可以参加拍卖会的价值？
t_en: Sinewy and full of texture, just like braised meat... You vaguely recall such a characteristic for a certain antique at an IPC auction. You wonder whether you could tack an auction-worthy price on this after you leave Amphoreus?

t_ch: 在很多世界，品质良好的无杂质红土是一种重要的矿物。
t_en: In many worlds, high-quality red clay absent of impurities is an essential mineral.

t_ch: 自然条件下，被地下水充分浸泡的红土足够柔软，可以被轻松塑形；但只要将它晾干，其中硬化固结的难溶盐分就能让红土成为像砖石一样坚固的硬块，足以抵御风雨的侵蚀。
t_en: Under natural conditions, red clay that has been amply soaked in groundwater is soft enough to be shaped into any form. But once it is dried, the hardened insoluble salts within turn it into a block as durable as brick itself, capable of withstanding erosion from inclement weather.

t_ch: …不知道这是否和大地兽能够如此强壮有关。
t_en: ...I wonder if this is the reason for a dromas' toughness.

t_ch: 「大地兽眼中最美味的食物…要是能拥有可以品尝它的味蕾就好了。」——奇怪，你为什么会反复冒出这样的念头？
t_en: "The most delicious food to a dromas... If only I possessed the taste buds to savor it." Strange, why are you suddenly having such notions?

t_ch: 将自己的命运交托给某种外部的事物——仔细想来，一切文明之中似乎都会产生这种现象。一个人在孤独的宇宙中确实无法独自生活下去…至少也需要把自己的后背交付给某个朋友。
t_en: To entrust your own fate to an external factor... On further contemplation, such phenomena apparently occur within all civilizations. A lone person in the universe is certainly incapable of survival... They will at least need one trustworthy friend to have their back.

t_ch: 在漫漫银河之中，究竟有多少上位存在每天接收着这样的顶礼膜拜？有形的你已经无法数清，更何况还有像信用点这样于无形之中令人屈膝的存在。唉，生活不易啊。
t_en: Amid the vast cosmic expanse, exactly how many superior beings receive such obeisance every day? You've already lost count of the tangible ones, let alone the people prostrating before intangible forces like credits. *sigh* Life is tough.

t_ch: 据说所有的信仰，都是为了祓除人们内心中对虚无的永恒恐惧。 你不禁暗暗许愿，希望这个陌生的世界能够平稳安泰，众生永远不会被高于他们的神秘存在无情摧毁。
t_en: It is said that the foundation of all faiths is to dispel the eternal fear of nihility existing in people's hearts. You can't help but silently wish that this strange world will stay steady and peaceful and that the masses will never be confronted with merciless annihilation by a mysterious existence beyond them.

t_ch: 话虽如此，有一点你很清楚…比起如何解释一个世界，更重要的是如何去改变一个世界——让它变成某种更美好的样子。
t_en: Even so, you are sure of one thing... Rather than being able to explain a world, what's more important is to be able to change it for the better, no matter what that may be.

t_ch: 文明总是伴随着定义各种各样的价值而发展。在某些时刻，这样的价值有助于人们团结在一起，满怀积极地面对生活…而在另一些时候，它又会变成自由的枷锁。
t_en: The advancement of civilizations has always been accompanied by myriad values, all of which have diverse definitions. At certain moments, such values will band the people together, living life with optimism... Other times, it becomes the fetters that bind freedom.

t_ch: 对于奥赫玛来说，现实更接近于哪一种呢？
t_en: Which one is closer to Okhema's reality?

t_ch: 有时候你会觉得经过编纂的历史就是一种名为「秩序」的模因——乱糟糟的生活在故事中总会变得井然有序，人们的经历甚至可以像交响乐一样形成某种合奏。
t_en: Sometimes you will feel that a compiled history is just a meme known as "order" — a chaotic life always becomes orderly in a story, and people's experiences may even meld together to form a collective harmonic symphony.

t_ch: 趁四下无人投个硬币许愿如何？可惜云石市集总是那么热闹，让你没有合适的机会。当然——如果你真的这么做了，法吉娜会不会因此生气也是个问题。
t_en: How about tossing a coin to make a wish while no one's around? Unfortunately, the usual rowdiness of Marmoreal Market prevents you from doing so. Then again, if you really did it, Phagousa's wrath is also something you have to consider.

t_ch: …哦，也许到时候跳出来的会是扎格列斯？比如因为你把钱币用在如此无意义的事情上而生气什么的？唔，它应该不会那么小气吧。
t_en: ...Oh, maybe Zagreus will pop out instead? Like, you made them angry because you used a coin on such a meaningless endeavor? Mmm, it probably won't be that petty.

t_ch: 「各位客人：受黑潮影响，云石旅舍已被元老院征用，负责临时安置避难的外邦人。恢复原业务时间另行通知。」
t_en: "Dear Guests: Due to the black tide, the Marmoreal Inn has been requisitioned by the Council of Elders to function as a temporary shelter for outlanders. Restoration of normal business services will be announced at a later date."

t_ch: ——看来你是不能在这里另开一间房了。
t_en: ...Looks like you won't be getting an extra room here.

t_ch: ——不过你为什么要开房呢？就为了退房吗？
t_en: ...But why are you getting a room? Just to check out?

t_ch: 你不禁觉得会产生这个想法的自己还真是个天才。
t_en: You think yourself quite the genius for even having this thought.

t_ch: 此处视野开阔、幽静隐蔽，分明是盗贼理想的望风点，情侣最爱的约会地。
t_en: The view here is sweeping, quiet and concealed, an ideal vantage point for a thief, and the best place for lovers on a date.

t_ch: 自此俯瞰街道，你能将往来的行人尽收眼底；而最妙的是，他们看不到你。
t_en: Overlooking the streets from here, you can surveil all the pedestrians below you. And the best part is... they can't see you.

t_ch: 雕塑的存在挡住了这里的美景——早该给它一球棒了，这种粗糙的玩意儿摆在这儿只会污人眼睛。
t_en: The statue's presence hinders the scenery here — you should've given it a smash with your bat. Its crude workmanship is an affront to one's aesthetics.

t_ch: 不过你敏锐地注意到，雕塑在破碎的一瞬间，碎片四散而下，似乎朝着什么地方飞去，落地时发出了清脆的响声。
t_en: But you keenly notice that the instant the statue shatters, while its fragments are scattered all over, it's as if they are flying somewhere, before being strewn on the ground in a crisp cascade of sounds.

t_ch: 一阵急促的脚步声在你耳侧响起——
t_en: A wave of brisk footsteps reaches your ears...

t_ch: 喂喂喂，刚才是你干的好事吧？看不出来啊，好好的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}居然这么没素质，高空抛物，都砸到我头上了！
t_en: Hey you, did you do this? I wouldn't have guessed — a decent-looking {F#young lady}{M#young man} like you throwing things from high up like a hooligan! They hit me on the head!

t_ch: 哎哟，我这后脑勺好疼，我现在感觉还有点晕…呕…呕…还有点想吐，你别走，我要是有什么三长两短……
t_en: Ooh, the back of my head hurts. I'm starting to feel faint... Ugh... Urp... I think I'm going to throw up. You wait right there. If something bad happens to me...

t_ch: 我的伙食费、看诊的费用，还有不能上工的误工费，加起来给你便宜点算，总共<unbreak>9999</unbreak>利衡币，给你抹个零头，就按<unbreak>9000</unbreak>利衡币算。
t_en: My meals and treatment cost, and compensation for missed work... I'll give you a discount... A total of <unbreak>9,999</unbreak> Balance Coins! I'll round that down for you, <unbreak>9,000</unbreak> will do.

t_ch: 识相点，赶紧赔给我，钱不够的话写欠条也可以——别想着赖账啊，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你也不想被我扭送到卫兵那儿去对吧？
t_en: Better not make this any worse and cough up the dough. I take IOUs if you don't have enough cash... And don't even think about skipping out, {F#girl}{M#boy}. You don't want me to call the guards now, do you?

t_ch: 理性驳斥，拒绝赔款。
t_en: Retort sensibly and decline to pay.

t_ch: 你仔细地跟他分析了一遍，无论从露台底下草坪的痕迹看，还是他后脑勺的状况来看，都不存在你高空抛物的可能。
t_en: You scrutinize his entire person — from the markings on the turf below the terrace, to the back of his head, you see no traces of you throwing any objects from a height.

t_ch: 你发誓那雕像已被你砸得稀巴烂，可惜他并不相信你所说的一切，尽管你的论述是如此合理，如此充分。
t_en: You swear that statue was shattered into smithereens, but he doesn't believe a word you say, no matter how reasonable and adequate your details are.

t_ch: 无奈之下，你拿出球棒，决定给他演示一下你之前的操作——
t_en: Seeing no other way, you unsheathe your bat and decide to demonstrate what you just did...

t_ch: 用绝对的力量威胁他。
t_en: Threaten him with absolute power.

t_ch: 见多识广的开拓者很快便搞清了现况，很明显，该男子是来碰瓷的——无非是看你是个小年轻，长得又和善，便以为好欺负。
t_en: Any seasoned Trailblazer would have caught on to the situation quickly. It is obvious that this man is trying to scam you. He identified you as suitable prey as soon as he saw you were someone young with an allegedly kind face.

t_ch: 对付这种地痞无赖，一根球棒足矣——
t_en: A bat to the face is all that's required for such spineless thugs...

t_ch: 你挥舞着球棒，还未有任何进攻性动作，对方见你这架势，气焰就弱了七分。
t_en: You give your baseball bat a few test swings, but before you've even made any aggressive moves, he sees your stance and his demeanor instantly turns to mush.

t_ch: 哎哟，你看我这记性，我想起来，是我没站稳，被旁边的树枝划拉了一下，掉了几根头发，现在一点都不疼了！
t_en: Oh dear, curse this memory of mine, I remember now! My feet weren't steady! I brushed into a nearby branch, and a few strands of hair fell out. It doesn't hurt anywhere anymore!

t_ch: 是我记错了，误会，都是误会！这里有些茶水钱，您若是得空，可以去浴场里休息休息，喝两杯法吉娜佳酿，给您润润嗓子。
t_en: I misremembered. It's all a minor misunderstanding! Here's a small token for you to buy some tea. If you've got time, you can relax at the baths, have a few sips of Phagousa's fine brew and slake your thirst.

t_ch: 他将钱袋塞到你手里，竟不给你拒绝的机会，一溜烟就跑开了。
t_en: He shoves the money pouch into your hands and scurries away before you can even refuse.

t_ch: 奥赫玛…真是座神奇的城市。
t_en: Okhema... certainly is an interesting city.

t_ch: 你躺在躺椅上，仰望着不远处的巨幅壁画：灿烂的黎明、流动的星云，还有缥缈的…好吧，你不得不承认画家的笔触过于抽象，使你分辨不出这究竟画了什么。
t_en: You lie back on the lounger, gazing at the giant mural not far in the distance: A splendid dawn, a nebula stream, and the ethereal... All right, you have to admit the painter's brushwork is too abstract, and you can't figure out what was painted.

t_ch: 用料如此奢华的壁画，想必是名家之作，却勾勒不出天空半分的美。艾格勒在美学上的修为或许不如墨涅塔，却随手便创造了壮阔的天空。人与泰坦之间的差距实在是令人感叹。
t_en: It must have been a famed master painter who did this piece with such opulence, yet it can't even capture a fraction of the sky's beauty. Aquila's enlightenment in the arts may not best Mnestia's, yet the endless sky was created with a mere hand wave. The difference between humans and Titans is truly insurmountable.

t_ch: 躺椅的角度刚好能让人平视对面的壁画，上面描绘着云石天宫的传说：黎明机器、永恒之城、众神的光辉......
t_en: The lounger is perfectly angled for you to fully take in the mural. The legend of Marmoreal Palace is painted on it: The Dawn Device, the Eternal City, the radiance of the gods...

t_ch: 你正陷入沉思，一只小奇美拉蹑手蹑脚地溜过，在躺椅上抖落几片翅膀上的水珠——连它都知道不该惊扰这片美景的安宁。
t_en: You sink into deep rumination, when a tiny chimera trots over and shakes itself, leaving dewdrops fallen from its wings onto the lounger — even it knows not to disrupt the serenity of this image.

t_ch: 堆满卷轴的长桌，你原以为会在这里看到什么高深的著作，没想到打开全是「如何正常使用浴池十步洗漱法」之类的说明书。
t_en: The long table is piled with scrolls. You thought there would be esoteric works buried within, only to find that all of them are instruction manuals such as Ten Steps to Wash Yourself in a Bath.

t_ch: 你随手拿起一卷展开，第一条就写着：「切勿直接饮用浴池中的泉水。」——看来前人在此吃过不少苦头。
t_en: You pick up a scroll to read. The first line writes: "Please refrain from directly using the bath's springwater." — it appears that someone suffered quite a bit to come up with this tip.

t_ch: 休息区的长桌上散落着各式各样的卷轴，你抽出最底下的一份细看起来——是张欠条，内容是「借走圣水一瓶，日后十倍奉还。」落款却是几十年前的日期，看来法吉娜的信徒记性有点差。
t_en: Various scrolls are strewn across the rest area's long table. You pull out one from the bottom of the pile and scrutinize it — it is a debt receipt that reads: "Borrowed a vial of sacred water, will repay tenfold in the future." It's dated dozens of years ago, though. You guess that Phagousa's disciples don't have the best memory.

t_ch: 旁听
t_en: Listen

t_ch: 水漫琴，受法吉娜赐福的乐器，旋律醉人。周围水体的流量越大，乐器的声音也越响亮。
t_en: The water harp, an instrument blessed by Phagousa, is capable of producing a riveting melody. The more water that flows around it, the more resonant the music is.

t_ch: 名为水漫琴的乐器。个别信奉法吉娜的城邦会把它抬上战场，作为扰乱敌人军心的手段使用。
t_en: An instrument called a water harp. Some cities that worship Phagousa transport it onto the battlefield as a method of disrupting enemy troop momentum.

t_ch: 半圆形的阳台向外延伸，将整片山景尽收眼底。远处的大地兽在青草间穿行，留下蜿蜒的足迹。
t_en: A semicircular balcony that extends outward, overlooking the entire mountain view. Dromases in the distance gambol across the meadows, leaving serpentine trails.

t_ch: 或许在泰坦的眼中，我们这些在浴场里来来往往的身影，和那些大地兽也没什么不同。
t_en: Perhaps in the Titans' eyes, our shuffling figures in the baths are no different from those frolicking dromases.

t_ch: 你正沉醉于阳台外的美景，草坪处却有一对情侣突然闯入，在注意到你的视线后又慌忙退了出去。
t_en: Your scenic reverie by the balcony is interrupted by a couple who has waded into the meadow. They flee in a flushed panic upon noticing your stare.

t_ch: 看来不是每个享受风景的人都像你这样纯粹——虽然你也说不准，自己到底是在欣赏风景，还是在看那头正在挠痒的大地兽。
t_en: Looks like not everyone is as innocent as you in simply wanting to enjoy the view. Even you're not too sure if you're truly immersing yourself in nature's tapestry, or just inspecting that dromas scratching itself.

t_ch: 饰壁里拉
t_en: Wall Lyre

t_ch: 似乎具有精巧的结构，音律一刻不停地自行流淌。
t_en: A seemingly intricate construct that flows with music on its own.

t_ch: 莫非有人躲在墙壁后面轮班演奏——纵横星间的球棒侠，自然不会有这么幼稚的想法。
t_en: Could musicians be hiding behind the wall and taking turns to play it? The baseballer hero who has traversed stars would naturally not entertain such juvenile conjecture.

t_ch: 懂了，这是只「里拉精」——依照经验，你给出判断。
t_en: You've got it, it's a Lyre Fairy — your experience lends weight to your deduction.

t_ch: 你总觉得它的设计实在眼熟——即使突然开始播放「失物招领」的通知，你恐怕也不会感到意外。
t_en: You find its design very familiar — you wouldn't be surprised, even if a Lost-and-Found notice is suddenly broadcast.

t_ch: 如果自己去拨动一下琴弦，能发出不同的声音吗？说干就干。
t_en: If you twang the strings yourself, will they make different sounds? Let's try it.

t_ch: 你够不着。
t_en: You can't reach it.

t_ch: 改天骗…循循善诱，让丹恒一起来试试。
t_en: Next time, I'll trick... persuade Dan Heng into trying it out with me.

t_ch: 高温浴池
t_en: Hot Bath

t_ch: 腾腾热气让你有些睁不开眼。温暖的事物总是模糊不清——你发出感慨。
t_en: You have to squint your eyes from the steaming heat. Events exuding warmth are always hazy — you let out a sigh.

t_ch: 这一时的分心，让你被过高的水温烫了一下。
t_en: A moment's distraction, and you're scalded by hot water.

t_ch: 热烈的事物总是带来痛苦——你懒得继续感慨了。
t_en: Intense events usually bring pain — you can't be bothered to keep sighing.

t_ch: 你从未想过这一天来得如此之快——大锅炖自己这种事，分明该是压箱底的绝学。
t_en: You never thought this day would arrive so quickly — stewing yourself in a huge pot is basically the ultimate move.

t_ch: 在低温浴池保鲜，在高温浴池烹煮——完善的厨房体系在你脑中被构建出来。
t_en: Refreshing awareness in the cold bath, stewing in the hot bath — a perfect kitchen system has been formulated in your head.

t_ch: 还是停一停吧，这里随处都是信徒。
t_en: Better stop it for now, there are disciples everywhere.

t_ch: 低温浴池
t_en: Cold Bath

t_ch: 低温浴池的寒气砭人肌骨，据说常常泡在低温浴池中，有助于维持年轻的身体状态。真是很棒的…呃…保鲜意识。
t_en: The cold bath chills you to the bone. It's said that taking regular cold baths helps with maintaining youthful vigor. This is really good for... err... refreshing awareness.

t_ch: 你鼓起勇气试了试水温，将一部分身体浸入其中——
t_en: You muster your courage and test the temperature, soaking part of your body into it...

t_ch: 你决定将今日之举当作与三月七的谈资。
t_en: You decide to use today's experience as a conversation topic with March 7th.

t_ch: 「从这冰一般的池子出去后，我何尝不能自称四月八。」
t_en: "When I emerge from this icy bath, I'd practically be April 8th."

t_ch: 试温池
t_en: Test Bath

t_ch: 与浴池连通，能更便捷地感受今日水温是否中意。
t_en: Connected to the bath to conveniently check if today's temperature is suitable.

t_ch: 作为浅试今日水温的设施，它原本更加精巧，看上去如同喷泉。
t_en: A facility used to quickly test today's water temperature. Originally more intricate, akin to a fountain.

t_ch: 奈何总是有人产生误解，从这里接水喝——否则也不必改造成眼下的样子。
t_en: There's always someone who mistakes this for a water dispenser and drinks from it, otherwise it wouldn't have been redesigned in its current form.

t_ch: 虽说这么明显的改造…事实上也收效甚微。
t_en: It has been obviously modified... but to little effect.

t_ch: 餐桌
t_en: Dining Table

t_ch: 餐点种类繁多，随时可以自行取用。并且，无论哪一样看上去都极为新鲜，想必更换得很勤快。
t_en: Plenty of dishes arranged on it for self-service, and, everything looks refreshingly... fresh. They're probably quick to switch out dishes.

t_ch: 现在你不是很饿，只不过是想对当地特色多些了解——必要的话，说是馋了也可以。
t_en: You're not very hungry now, you just want to learn more about the local cuisine — if need arises, you can just say you're peckish.

t_ch: 肉食，水果，点心——你用讲究的次序逐个品尝。
t_en: Meats, fruit, desserts — you sample every dish in order, with gourmet curiosity.

t_ch: 而那看似盆栽的特色美食，你也是直到入口才发现……
t_en: And that trademark dish that looks like a potted plant, it isn't until you have a mouthful that you realize...

t_ch: 怎么还真是盆栽？
t_en: It actually tastes like a potted plant?

t_ch: 眼前的景象堪称壮美——这是自然，据说法吉娜便曾以巨大贝壳的形象示于人前。
t_en: The scenery before you is majestic — Of course it would be. It is said that Phagousa once appeared before humans in the form of a giant shell.

t_ch: 整座浴场用之不竭的水源均由此而来，法吉娜在信徒眼中是如此慷慨，只有她的赐福「倾泻而下」。
t_en: The infinite water supply for the entire bath comes from here. To the disciples, Phagousa's generosity knows no bounds, for it is their blessing that pours down unto them.

t_ch: 这实在是个好位置，整场宴会一览无余。一种成为焦点的冲动怂恿着你。
t_en: This is indeed a good spot to oversee the entire banquet. An impulse to become the center of attention prods at you.

t_ch: 「我宣布个事」——犹豫再三，你还是没有喊出这句话。
t_en: "I have something to announce" — after a few moments of hesitation, you fail to shout out your declaration.

t_ch: 此处能供黄金裔涤净黑潮的侵染，考虑到入浴的时长，这些设施的布置理所应当——罚站可招人记恨。
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs can be cleansed of the black tide's corruption here. Considering the amount of time you need to spend in the bath, the facility's layout is appropriate — being forced to stand would only earn the ire of its users.

t_ch: 据说，也有一位桀骜的黄金裔向来厌恶这里——他对水温的要求太别致了。
t_en: It is said that there is also a rebellious Chrysos Heir who disdains this place — he has very particular demands about the water temperature.

t_ch: 黄金裔的餐桌，通过上面的餐点，似乎可以猜到有谁不久前曾在此落座。
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs' dining table. From its spread, one can guess who was just here recently.

t_ch: 出于谨慎，一些人在这里会尽量不使用掉渣的餐点——毫无必要，这能涤荡污浊的受赐之水，还没敏感到「眼里容不得沙子」。
t_en: Out of caution, some people will try to refrain from foods that leave behind many crumbs, though that is entirely unnecessary — this blessed water that can even cleanse corruption is not so sensitive that it won't even tolerate a speck of sand.

t_ch: 岁月注视着你，无需惶惶，它平等地注视着一切，漠视一切，夺走一切。
t_en: Time watches over you, no need to fear. It watches over everything equally, indifferent to all, claiming all in its passing.

t_ch: 泰坦——翁法罗斯最符合「神明」概念的事物之一，与其他世界那些难寻实体的精神寄托不同，巨躯彰显着它的「存在」。
t_en: Titans — beings that most closely epitomize Amphoreus' concept of divinity. Different from those elusive spiritual custodians of other worlds, their monolithic figures are tangible evidence of their existence.

t_ch: 饰壁里拉
t_en: Wall Lyre

t_ch: 似乎具有精巧的结构，音律一刻不停地自行流淌。
t_en: A seemingly intricate construct that flows with music on its own.

t_ch: 莫非有人躲在墙壁后面轮班演奏——纵横星间的球棒侠，自然不会有这么幼稚的想法。
t_en: Could musicians be hiding behind the wall and taking turns to play it? The baseballer hero who has traversed stars would naturally not entertain such juvenile conjecture.

t_ch: 懂了，这是只「里拉精」——依照经验，你给出判断。
t_en: You've got it, it's a Lyre Fairy — your experience lends weight to your deduction.

t_ch: 你总觉得它的设计实在眼熟——即使突然开始播放「失物招领」的通知，你恐怕也不会感到意外。
t_en: You find its design very familiar — you wouldn't be surprised, even if a Lost-and-Found notice is suddenly broadcast.

t_ch: 如果自己去拨动一下琴弦，能发出不同的声音吗？说干就干。
t_en: If you twang the strings yourself, will they make different sounds? Let's try it.

t_ch: 你够不着。
t_en: You can't reach it.

t_ch: 改天骗…循循善诱，让丹恒一起来试试。
t_en: Next time, I'll trick... persuade Dan Heng into trying it out with me.

t_ch: 倾听水漫琴
t_en: Listen to the water lyre

t_ch: 这种乐器名为水漫琴，拥有法吉娜的赐福，旋律醉人。据说个别信奉「海洋」的城邦会把它抬上战场，作为扰乱敌人军心的手段使用。
t_en: This instrument is called a water lyre, and its enchanting melody has Phagousa's benediction. Rumor has it that cities worshiping "Ocean" would carry one into battle as a means of chipping away at enemy morale.

t_ch: 什么样的声音能扰乱军心？弥斯的手指在金键上跳跃，位置、强弱和时长各有不同，风管中仿佛有清泉涌出。
t_en: What kind of song could chip away at enemy morale? Misia's fingers dance across the golden keys, playing different notes at different dynamics for different lengths. The effect is like a geyser of springwater gushing out of the pipe.

t_ch: 你看见坚冰融化、草木抽芽，孩童自由地嬉戏玩耍…如镜般的美好画面在眼前徐徐展开，这幅愿景足以让战士放下刀剑，箭矢止住飞行。
t_en: You see a dense floe of ice melting, new grass sprouting, and children playing freely... A beautiful picture unfolds before your eyes like a kaleidoscope, and it's enough to make the warriors sheathe their swords and un-nock their arrows.

t_ch: 悠扬的旋律一路上升，浸染了浴场的每个角落——这种乐器周围的水流量越大，声音也越嘹亮，就像海潮。
t_en: The melodious tune rises up all the way, seeping into every corner of the baths. The more water flows around the instrument, the louder it grows — just like a tide.

t_ch: 一曲终了，旋律在短暂的静默后再度响起，如潮水抚摸海岸，一浪又一浪。
t_en: As the song ends, the melody rises once more after a short pause — just like the tide lapping against the shore, one wave at a time.

t_ch: 培育奇美拉的装置，外形是棵繁茂的大树。「生命树种」究竟是如何在其中成长为那样古灵精怪的小生物的，问题的答案恐怕只有瑟希斯知道了。
t_en: The device for nurturing chimeras looks like a huge, luscious tree on the outside. Through what process did the Seed of Life manage to produce such weird little creatures within? Perhaps the only one who could answer that question is Cerces.

t_ch: 你被流逝的时间击倒了。
t_en: You are struck down by the passage of time.

t_ch: 最伤人的东西除言语外，还有时间。
t_en: Aside from words, time is what hurts the most.

t_ch: 你成功击倒了你自己。
t_en: You successfully knocked yourself down.

t_ch: 它不会咬人，却用另一种方式击倒了你。
t_en: It doesn't bite, yet it finds another way to knock you off your feet.

t_ch: 你被砸晕了…但物件能有什么坏心思呢？
t_en: You have been knocked out... but what bad intentions could an object possibly harbor?

t_ch: 倒塌的柱子，在你的帮助下重新担负起顶天立地的重责，却没有人问它究竟是否愿意。
t_en: With your help, the fallen pillar is once again able to take on the duty to carry the sky — but nobody bothers to ask whether it's willing.

t_ch: 将它复原后，你不禁思索——它的存在是否有些多余？但回答你的只有无尽的虚无。
t_en: Now restored, you cannot help but wonder — isn't its entire existence a little redundant? But the only answer you receive is endless nothingness.

t_ch: 破碎的雕塑恢复如初，金属框架流畅优雅，像是某种古老机械的一部分。这种设计让你联想到「黎明机器」，或许这就是建造者的用意？
t_en: The broken sculpture is now as good as new, with its smooth metal frame seeming like a part of some ancient elegant machine. It's a design that reminds you of the Dawn Device — perhaps that was the intention of its creator?

t_ch: 雕塑框架扭曲变形，像是一只闭上的机械眼睛。你想起艾格勒曾有百双眼睛注视大地，如今却只剩下这些人造的微光。
t_en: The sculpture's frame is twisted, like a closed mechanical eye. You remember Aquila once had a hundred pairs of eyes observing the world — yet now, only these artificial glimmers remain.

t_ch: 浮雕重新焕发光彩，中央装置散发出稳定的光芒。但只要有一丝外力——如果你上去敲一棒子，那一丝微光便会再度消失。
t_en: The relief regains its former luster, and the central device emits a stable beam of light. But the slightest force such as a knock with a stick is enough to make the light disappear.

t_ch: 雕塑的外形和「黎明机器」有几分相似，难怪有人说奥赫玛的每一寸墙砖都在模仿那位背负光明的泰坦。
t_en: The sculpture looks rather similar to the Dawn Device. No wonder people say that every single wall tile in Okhema is an imitation of the light-bearing Titan.

t_ch: 可惜，只要受到外力压迫，仿品也难逃破碎的命运，这或许有某种寓意，你无法参透。
t_en: Unfortunately, so long as there is external pressure, replicas cannot avoid being broken. You're unable to decipher what this actually means as an analogy.

t_ch: 看来有些东西注定要守护在原地，就像「永恒之城」始终保留着最后的光明。
t_en: It seems like some things are destined to be protected where they lie — just like the Eternal City holds onto the last light forever.

t_ch: 原本为读者照明的灯盏早已熄灭，在你的帮助下，光亮重现。蒸汽折射出柔和的光晕，仿佛回到了浴场最繁盛的那段时光。
t_en: The reading lamp had long been extinguished, but with your help, it is reignited. The steam reflects a soft aura as if returning to the most prosperous days of the baths.

t_ch: 疲惫的迎宾员重新回到了它的岗位，有趣，连浴场的灯柱都需要休息——说到底，这里可是法吉娜的地盘。
t_en: The exhausted usher returns to their post. That's interesting — even the lampposts in the baths need to take a rest. After all, this is Phagousa's turf.

t_ch: 灯柱为自己缺失的关注而强烈抗议着，可惜你修好了它。
t_en: The lamppost protests aggressively at its lack of attention. It's a shame you fixed it up already.

t_ch: 灯柱回到了岗位，但你总觉得它们在背后偷偷打着哈欠——这大概就是工作太久的后遗症。
t_en: The lamppost returns to its post, but you can't shake the feeling that they're all sneaking a yawn behind your back — probably the aftermath of too much overtime.

t_ch: 你不愿见到地面散落的碎石瓦砾，但就算修好了灯柱，它究竟又能在这坚守多久呢？
t_en: You hate seeing the ground cluttered with rubble, but even with the lamppost repaired, how long can it hold up?

t_ch: 碎裂的雕塑真能恢复如初吗？你很想亲自检验它的强度。并且，机会似乎就在你的眼前。
t_en: Can a shattered sculpture truly be made whole again? You're keen to test its resilience, and the chance may just be at hand.

t_ch: 好吧，至少从击碎雕塑的手感来看，它和新品确实没什么区别。但你可以再试试。
t_en: Well, from the feel of smashing the sculpture, it seems indistinguishable from a new one. Perhaps you should try again.

t_ch: 瑟希斯的赐福
t_en: The Benediction of Cerces

t_ch: 你仿佛听到了瑟希斯的呢喃——静心，清念，在下次的纷扰中，你将被自然的气息吹拂。
t_en: It's as if you can hear Cerces whispering — calm your mind, clear your thoughts, and let nature's breath soothe you through the turmoil ahead.

t_ch: 法吉娜的赐福
t_en: The Benediction of Phagousa

t_ch: 你沐浴在法吉娜的秘酿之中——那迷人的韵味，好似令你自己更为坚实。
t_en: You are immersed in Phagousa's ambrosia, its captivating aroma seeming to strengthen your very essence.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的赐福
t_en: The Benediction of Oronyx

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的祷言在你身旁环绕——命运未定，命运无定，但它眷恋于你。
t_en: The prayers of Oronyx swirl around you — destiny is undefined and ever-changing, yet it clings to you.

t_ch: 塔兰顿的赐福
t_en: The Benediction of Talanton

t_ch: 塔兰顿将天秤的一端示于你的面前——这或许是它的认可，认可你拥有裁决罪恶的权利。
t_en: Talanton presents one end of the scale before you — perhaps as a recognition, acknowledging your right to judge the guilty.

t_ch: 整理思绪
t_en: Collect your thoughts

t_ch: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
t_en: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

t_ch: 这地方还挺凉快…以后可以常来坐坐，整理下思绪什么的。
t_en: This place is pretty refreshing... It would be a great place to come and reflect on my thoughts.

t_ch: 整理思绪
t_en: Collect your thoughts

t_ch: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
t_en: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

t_ch: 白厄的试炼仍未结束…也不知道他情况如何了。
t_en: Phainon's trial is not over yet... I wonder how he is getting on?

t_ch: 你想起与那白发青年的初见，那时的他意气风发，仿佛天下再无对手；你又想起他投身试炼之前的表现，不算犹豫，但也绝非自信。
t_en: You reflect on your first meeting with the white-haired man. Back then, he was so spirited, like no one in the world could stand in his way. Then, you think about his expression before he threw himself into his trial. Though he wasn't hesitating, he was also far from confident.

t_ch: 身为传说中的「救世主」，身负那样沉重的预言，他会有怎样的压力？倘若失败，他又会面临怎样的责难？
t_en: Just what kind of pressure is he under, shouldering the burden of being the legendary and prophesied "Deliverer?" If he were to fail, what kind of blame would he face?

t_ch: 看来，救世还真不是件容易事。但或许正因明知结局仍义无反顾，凡人才会在故事中背负英雄的名号。
t_en: It seems that saving the world is no simple matter. However, perhaps mortals can become "heroes" in stories because they do not hesitate despite knowing the inevitable outcome.

t_ch: …希望他能实现夙愿吧。
t_en: ...I hope that he will achieve his wish.

t_ch: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
t_en: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

t_ch: 收集火种、再创世界…泰坦的力量真能做到那种事？
t_en: Collecting the Coreflames and creating the world anew... Is the strength of the Titans really capable of such things?

t_ch: 泰坦、火种、黄金裔…初登列车时，你曾吐槽自己进入了科幻电影——现在变成奇幻电影了。
t_en: Titans, Coreflames, Chrysos Heirs... When you first boarded the Express, you had once complained that you'd fallen into a sci-fi movie... Now, it's suddenly a fantasy movie.

t_ch: 在这片创世涡心，你与黄金裔们闹出误会、又解开了误会。你有想过离开这颗星球，却最终获得一位泰坦的力量，和黄金裔们站在了同一阵线。
t_en: Inside this Vortex of Genesis, you and the Chrysos Heirs came to a misunderstanding that you were fortunately able to resolve. Though you considered leaving this planet, you ended up gaining the power of a Titan and standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs in battle.

t_ch: 他们的决心固然值得赞许，但泰坦们究竟是何方神圣？它们的力量来自哪里？若要开拓翁法罗斯，这些问题的答案必须写进智库才行。
t_en: Their determination is admirable, but just what are these Titans? Where does their power come from? If Amphoreus is to be trailblazed, these questions must be answered and entered into the data bank.

t_ch: 说起来，迷迷…还真是个迷啊。
t_en: Come to think of it, Mem... is a real mystery.

t_ch: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
t_en: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

t_ch: 「黑潮」，奇怪的名字…难道和星核有关？
t_en: The "Black Tide." What a strange name... Could that be related to Stellarons?

t_ch: 你不是第一次听说这东西，它是翁法罗斯灾难的源头。关于它的来历，你在脑海中闪过了几种不同的可能性，其中一个甚至让人后怕。
t_en: This is not the first time you've heard its name. It's the source of the disaster that is befalling Amphoreus. As for its origins, a number of possibilities flash through your mind — one of which leaves you feeling quite uneasy.

t_ch: 尼卡多利，纷争之泰坦，曾经的荣耀象征，如今沦落成「疯王」——哪怕拖着残破的身躯，它也要继续同黑潮抗争，严重性可见一斑。
t_en: The Strife Titan Nikador. They were once a symbol of glory and now they have fallen to become the "Mad King" — They continue to fight back against the black tide though their body is broken and battered. That's how you can tell how serious this disaster is.

t_ch: 以过去的开拓经验来看，所有危机最终都与星核脱不了干系。可直觉告诉你，墙上的枪不会响三次，凡事也不能都推给纳努克。
t_en: From what you've learned in your trailblazing experience, every crisis ends up being related to the Stellarons. However, your intuition tells you that lightning never strikes the same place twice, and not all such things can be written off as the work of Nanook.

t_ch: …但愿这次开拓也能顺利收场。
t_en: Let's just hope that this trailblaze can have a happy ending, too.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: This is the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目：
t_en: Welcome to a new episode of the Interastral Peace Broadcast:

t_ch: 赛杜尼拉默星群集结文明伟力，向绝灭大君「星啸」宣战。
t_en: The Sedounirama star cluster has gathered the might of its civilizations and declared war on the Lord Ravager Celenova.

t_ch: 奥瑟顿星突发智械植入体溶蚀事件，现已得到控制。
t_en: A sudden incident involving the corrosion of Intellitron implants occurred on the planet Oceton. It has now been brought under control.

t_ch: 星际通缉犯「千楼冢」伏案自首，声称自己是波尔卡•卡卡目的目标。
t_en: The interstellar wanted criminal "Mausolea" has turned herself in, claiming to be the next target of Polka Kakamond.

t_ch: 激雷乐队的告别演出在多世界圆满落幕，「记忆」得以延续。
t_en: The farewell performance of the band Sizzling Thunder has come to an end on multiple worlds, but the "memories" continue.

t_ch: 以下为您展开详细报道。
t_en: Let's take a closer look at the details.

t_ch: 近日，绝灭大君「星啸」的行迹于赛杜尼拉默星群边缘显露。
t_en: Recently, traces of the Lord Ravager Celenova have appeared at the edges of the Sedounirama star cluster.

t_ch: 作为「毁灭」最应手的先锋军，星啸恶名远扬，寰宇众生深受其害。
t_en: As the vanguard of the Destruction, Celenova is notorious throughout the universe for bringing disaster to all living beings.

t_ch: 在共同的威胁面前，赛杜尼拉默星群六个文明世界宣布结成同盟，向星啸发起反击。
t_en: Faced with this threat, the six civilized worlds of the Sedounirama star cluster have formed an alliance and launched a counterattack on Celenova.

t_ch: 星际和平公司旗帜鲜明地站在公义与和平的一方。岂曰无衣，与子同袍。让我们一同祝愿赛杜尼拉默星群剿匪凯旋。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation stands firmly on the side of peace and justice. The Sedounirama star cluster has our full support. Let us all wish them success in this fight.

t_ch: 奥瑟顿星素以「智械植入体」闻名。日前，该枢纽星发生离奇意外。
t_en: A few days ago, an unusual incident occurred on Oceton, a hub planet famous for its Intellitron implants.

t_ch: 一夜之间，居民装配的植入体全部溶蚀，星港失去运作能力，对运输工作产生了恶劣影响。
t_en: Overnight, the implants of all residents suffered deep corrosion, and the starport is now no longer functional. This has had a severe impact on transportation work.

t_ch: 星际和平公司及时介入，控制了奥瑟顿星的局势，防止惨剧进一步恶化。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation has promptly intervened, bringing the situation on Oceton under control and preventing it from worsening.

t_ch: 公司对类似的智械危机具有丰富处理经验。经过和平协商，奥瑟顿星事件由「战略投资部」正式接手并进行善后工作。
t_en: The IPC has a wealth of experience dealing with similar Intellitron crises. After peaceful negotiations, the Strategic Investment Department officially took over on Oceton and is dealing with the aftermath.

t_ch: 知名窃忆者「千楼冢」自首。该通缉犯曾多次破坏珍贵的宇宙文化遗产，托耳塔尼石刻群、梅洛星云画卷和普罗多夫时空堰遗址都遭受过其人毒手。
t_en: The infamous Memosnatcher "Mausolea" has turned herself in. This criminal is wanted for destroying many precious cultural relics throughout the universe, including the Tortani stone inscriptions, the Merlo Nebula scroll paintings, and the ruins of the Plodov spacetime dam.

t_ch: 据称，她在最近一次犯罪时，目击到一位神秘的女士正在和异问魔交谈。该女性身着糖果色长裙，容貌难以分辨。
t_en: According to reports, during her most recent vandalism attempt, she saw a mysterious woman conversing with an Inquisition Spirit. This woman was wearing a candy-colored dress, but her face was not clearly visible.

t_ch: 千楼冢声称该女性即为「寂静领主」波尔卡•卡卡目，自己的生命安全受到了威胁，因而选择自首并要求得到天才俱乐部的帮助。
t_en: Mausolea claims that this woman was the "Lord of Silence" Polka Kakamond and that her own life is now in danger. As a result, she has turned herself in and requested aid from the Genius Society.

t_ch: 天才俱乐部#83黑塔女士拒绝引渡这名窃忆者，但异问魔究竟向寂静领主提出了什么问题，黑塔女士表示密切关注。
t_en: Genius Society #83, Madam Herta, refused to extradite the Memosnatcher, but she showed considerable interest in the questions posed to the Lord of Silence by the Inquisition Spirit.

t_ch: 激雷乐队是来自爱墨瑞得-Ⅲ的著名乐队。这颗星球所在的恒星系曾在红巨星爆发中被彻底摧毁，但乐队成员却拒绝逃亡，用最后一场巡演展现了生命的顽强意志。
t_en: Sizzling Thunder is a celebrated band from Emerald-III. This planet's star system was completely destroyed by the expansion of its red giant star, but the band refused to leave their home. Through their final tour, they demonstrated their tenacious will to live.

t_ch: 流光忆庭始终保存着乐队最后一场巡演的「记忆」。在公司授意下，忆庭将这段记忆分享给许多参与星球复兴工程的世界，表达他们对寰宇复苏的支持。
t_en: The Garden of Recollection has been preserving the "memories" of the band's last tour. On the advice of the IPC, in order to express their support for recovery across the universe, the Garden shared these memories with the many worlds participating in planetary revitalization projects.

t_ch: 日前，演出已经圆满落幕。现场观众们无不热泪盈眶，说他们这辈子也忘不了激雷乐队。
t_en: This performance recently came to a satisfying conclusion. The live audiences were deeply moved and said they would never be able to forget Sizzling Thunder.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
t_en: This is the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

t_ch: 晚上好。
t_en: Good evening.

t_ch: 首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容：
t_en: We are here to bring you the latest news from across the cosmos.

t_ch: 在多方势力协作下，绝灭大君「铁墓」威胁已被肃清。
t_en: Through the combined efforts of multiple factions, the menace of the Lord Ravager known as "Irontomb" has been successfully neutralized.

t_ch: 博识学会首次观测到名为「翁法罗斯」的新生星体，并正式将其编入星图。
t_en: The Intelligentsia Guild reports its first observation of a newly formed celestial body, designated as "Amphoreus," which has since been officially incorporated into astral charts.

t_ch: 「诸世界重建计划」顺利进入第三阶段，二相乐园文化复兴成果显著。
t_en: The ongoing "Worlds Reborn Initiative" has officially entered its third phase, as Planarcadia continues to make remarkable strides in cultural revitalization.

t_ch: 新伊甸-III矿业基地遭遇黑客攻击，经查系「星核猎手」所为。
t_en: A hacking incident has targeted the New Eden-III Mining Facility, with investigators confirming the "Stellaron Hunters" as the perpetrators.

t_ch: 以下为您展开详细报道。
t_en: Let's take a closer look at the details.

t_ch: 日前，为祸宇宙的绝灭大君「铁墓」被成功击溃。
t_en: In recent developments, the Lord Ravager "Irontomb" — once a scourge upon the universe — has been decisively crushed.

t_ch: 由星际和平公司主导，联合星穹列车、仙舟联盟、天才俱乐部等多方力量，寰宇文明共同取得了此次对「毁灭」的决定性胜利。
t_en: In a joint operation spearheaded by the Interastral Peace Corporation and supported by the Astral Express, Xianzhou Alliance, Genius Society, and numerous other forces, the civilizations of the universe have achieved a decisive victory over the Destruction.

t_ch: 这是继巡海游侠剿灭「诛罗」后，又一位绝灭大君的陨落。
t_en: This marks the fall of yet another Lord Ravager, following the Galaxy Rangers' defeat of "Zulo."

t_ch: 「铁墓」的影响遍及银河，为诸世界带来了沉重打击。危难当头，星际和平公司挺身而出，全面主持了受灾星球的重建工作。
t_en: With its reach spanning the cosmos, "Irontomb" delivered devastating blows to countless worlds. In response to this catastrophe, the Interastral Peace Corporation took decisive action, overseeing the restoration of all affected planets.

t_ch: 技术研发部提供的广谱疫苗已确认能有效预防「铁墓」感染。对于未覆盖医疗保障的星域，公司亦将分批次投放疫苗，请广大居民切勿惊慌。
t_en: The broad-spectrum vaccine developed by the Technology Department has been confirmed to effectively prevent "Irontomb" infections. For star zones without medical coverage, the IPC will distribute vaccines in phases. Residents are urged to remain calm.

t_ch: 善后过程中，一股神秘的良性数据流协助清除了残余病毒，并在所有受影响的设备上留下一则信息：「你好，世界」。
t_en: During the aftermath, a mysterious but benign data stream assisted in purging the remaining virus. On every affected device, it left a single message: "Hello, world."

t_ch: 星际和平公司对这位无名的守护者深表感谢，并向全体一线工作人员致敬。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation expresses heartfelt thanks to this anonymous protector and salutes all frontline workers for their dedication.

t_ch: 岂曰无衣，与子同袍。作为文明世界的坚实后盾，公司誓要对反物质军团采取进一步行动。本台将持续报道相关消息，愿捷讯频传。
t_en: Together, we stand united. As the firm pillar supporting civilized society, the IPC is committed to advancing operations against the Antimatter Legion. Stay tuned for ongoing coverage. We wish for good news ahead.

t_ch: 随着「铁墓」危机告一段落，一团由「记忆」造就的文明火种也在银河间悄然点亮。
t_en: Now that the Irontomb crisis has subsided, a kindling of civilization, nurtured by the Remembrance, has been lit in the cosmos.

t_ch: 公司代表从无名客口中获悉，这颗新生的星球名为「翁法罗斯」。
t_en: According to information provided by the Nameless, IPC representatives have learned that this newborn planet is called "Amphoreus."

t_ch: 博识学会的维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授表示，根据「赞达尔回归原理」，翁法罗斯必将衍生出文明，其忆质内容会成为文明演化的重要依据。
t_en: Dr. Veritas Ratio of the Intelligentsia Guild stated that, according to the "Zandar Recurrence Theorem," Amphoreus will inevitably give rise to civilization, and its memoria content will serve as a key foundation for the evolution of that civilization.

t_ch: 通过对权杖残片的逆向研究，{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#76}螺丝咕姆先生{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#83}黑塔女士{RUBY_E#}已初步复现部分数据。
t_en: Through reverse engineering of the scepter fragments, Genius Society members {RUBY_B#Genius Society #76}Mr. Screwllum{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Genius Society #83}Madam Herta{RUBY_E#} have successfully replicated a portion of the data.

t_ch: 这意味着，过去存在于这个世界中的{RUBY_B#电信号}生命{RUBY_E#}，或将在未来某一时刻重新诞生。
t_en: This suggests that {RUBY_B#electrical signals}life{RUBY_E#} which once existed in this world may one day be reborn in the future.

t_ch: 公司将秉持「存护」之道，为该星体提供必要的保障和引导。博识学会已就此向两位天才发出合作邀请，其中，黑塔女士尚未给出肯定答复。
t_en: The IPC will uphold the principles of the Preservation and provide essential protection and guidance for this planet. The Intelligentsia Guild has invited both geniuses to collaborate on this endeavor. However, Madam Herta has yet to give a definitive response.

t_ch: 我们有理由相信，假以时日，翁法罗斯必将成为寰宇大家庭中璀璨的一员。
t_en: We remain confident that Amphoreus, in due course, will establish itself as a beacon within the cosmic community.

t_ch: 历经数个琥珀纪的接力，「诸世界重建计划」于近日顺利进入第三阶段，大批来自哈托彼亚「古弁才天国」的文化遗产得到修复。
t_en: After several Amber Eras of relentless effort, the "Worlds Reborn Initiative" has recently successfully entered into its third phase, marked by the extensive restoration of cultural heritage from Ahatopia's "ancient Benzaitengoku."

t_ch: 「二相乐园」哈托彼亚曾是一幅美丽的画中世界。在公司援助下，幻造种居民们得以走进现实，其独特的艺术作品正通过星际网络传向宇宙。
t_en: Once confined to a picturesque World in Canvas, Planarcadia, located on Ahatopia, has become reality for its imagenae inhabitants thanks to IPC assistance. Their unique artistic creations are now being shared throughout the universe via the Interastral Network.

t_ch: 公司战略投资部干事真珠女士对此发表公开讲话：重建计划的下一阶段将以「艺术创新」为主题，推动文化产业蓬勃发展。
t_en: Madam Pearl, secretary of the Strategic Investment Department, announced that the upcoming stage of the Worlds Reborn Initiative will center on "artistic innovation," driving robust growth in cultural sectors.

t_ch: 此外，新一届「幻月游戏」的筹备工作亦在有序进行。作为「欢愉」星神留下的传统，该庆典吸引了各方势力关注。
t_en: Meanwhile, preparations for the newest Phantasmoon Games are well underway. Established by the Aeon of Elation, this time-honored event continues to attract interest from all corners.

t_ch: 星际和平公司预祝仪式圆满成功，愿欢声笑语洒满二相乐园的每一个角落。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation wishes the ceremony every success, expressing the hope that happiness and celebration will spread throughout all of Planarcadia.

t_ch: 不久前，公司旗下重要矿业基地新伊甸-III遭到网络黑客攻击。
t_en: A short while ago, New Eden-III, an important mining facility under the umbrella of the IPC, fell victim to a hacking attack.

t_ch: 该星球曾在对抗军团的战斗中遭到焚毁，重建期间，于地下探明储量巨大的反物质晶矿。
t_en: Previously ravaged in the fight against the Legion, the planet underwent reconstruction, during which massive reserves of antimatter crystal ore were identified underground.

t_ch: 经评估后，公司批准了该矿藏的开发计划，认为其蕴含的高浓度虚数能量将为当地产业复苏注入强大动力。
t_en: Following a thorough assessment, the IPC approved a development plan for the mine, believing that its high concentration of Imaginary Energy will provide a significant boost to the region's industrial recovery.

t_ch: 矿场负责人称，袭击发生前曾收到匿名警告。目前，由于网络瘫痪，挖掘工作已暂停。
t_en: The head of the mining site reported receiving an anonymous warning prior to the attack. Currently, excavation has been halted due to a network outage.

t_ch: 经公司网络安全部门调查取证，确认本次攻击系「星核猎手」成员银狼所为。
t_en: An investigation by the IPC's cybersecurity department has confirmed that Silver Wolf, a member of the Stellaron Hunters, was behind the recent cyberattack.

t_ch: 星际和平公司对此等破坏公共财产、威胁银河安全的恶劣行径予以强烈谴责，并向银狼追加十亿信用点悬赏。
t_en: The Interastral Peace Corporation strongly condemns such acts of public property destruction and threats to cosmic security, and has increased the bounty on Silver Wolf by one billion credits.

t_ch: 欢迎各位寰宇公民积极举报，本台将为线索提供者发放额外奖励。
t_en: We encourage all citizens of the cosmos to come forward with any information. This station will issue additional rewards to those who provide useful leads.

t_ch: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
t_en: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Goodbye.

t_ch: 远处的巨石像
t_en: Distant Stone Statue

t_ch: 当你们还在统治美丽的世界，还在领着那一代幸福的人。
t_en: When you are still ruling this beautiful world, when you're leading the happy people of that generation.

t_ch: 啊，神话中的伟丽天神啊，你竟已成如此模样！
t_en: Ah, the majestic divinity of legends past, look what you have become!

t_ch: 万径之门
t_en: Gate of Infinity

t_ch: 昔日被朝拜的圣城在悲叹，只余一丝火光供人凭想。
t_en: The holy city that was worshiped is lamenting, only a glimmer of fire was left for people to contemplate.

t_ch: 倘若还有眼泪，命运也会为自己的荒凉悲恸。
t_en: If there were tears, destiny would grieve for its desolation.

t_ch: 塔兰顿的天秤
t_en: Talanton's Scale

t_ch: 噢，塔兰顿！泰坦亦仰赖你的公正——
t_en: O, Talanton! Even the Titans relied on your fairness...

t_ch: 你让时空共鸣交融，海陆敬从边界，昼夜踏上轮回。
t_en: You let space and time resonate, ocean and land respect their borders, and night and day alternate.

t_ch: 此后，世界获救了，摆脱了混沌的暗流。
t_en: Then, the world was saved from the undercurrent of chaos.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的神像
t_en: Oronyx's Statue

t_ch: 我呼唤最远古的黑夜，祈求它带来最恒远的光明。
t_en: I call on the dark night of the very first age, and pray that it brings the most timeless light.

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯的神像默然。
t_en: Oronyx's statue stands quietly.

t_ch: 我泪流满面，是我忘却了，星光早已隐去粲然，夜芒也不再闪烁。
t_en: Tears stream down my face, and it was I who have forgotten. The stars have vanished, and the night sky no longer shines.

t_ch: 众民的壁画
t_en: Mural of the People

t_ch: 被拯救的人民留住你的的荣光，在每个{RUBY_B#清晨}明晰时{RUBY_E#}传唱：
t_en: The rescued people retained your honor, and chant during every {RUBY_B#dawn}Lucid Hour{RUBY_E#}:

t_ch: 为了唤醒明天，刻法勒负起太阳。
t_en: Kephale carries the sun to awaken tomorrow.

t_ch: 赞颂你，负世的泰坦！你令奥赫玛不必怀念阳光。
t_en: Praise you, the Titan with the world on its back! Okhema no longer longs for sunlight because of you.

t_ch: 姻缘树
t_en: Tree of Union

t_ch: 凡人也倾慕瑟希斯的美满，便立此树为幸福的见证——
t_en: The mortals adored Cerces' happiness, and planted a tree to witness the happiness.

t_ch: 在树下缔结美满的姻缘，庆祝生命的降生。
t_en: People form joyful unions under the tree and celebrate the birth of life.

t_ch: 无仪式时，市民们也搬来枕垫，三五围坐乘荫纳凉。
t_en: When there are no ceremonies, people bring their cushions and enjoy the shade.

t_ch: 云石天宫
t_en: Marmoreal Palace

t_ch: 奥赫玛建筑美学的杰作，眼前的云石天宫依山而坐，显扬不对称的律动之美。
t_en: An architectural masterpiece from Okhema, the Marmoreal Palace was build alongside a mountain to demonstrate the beauty of asymmetrical rhythms.

t_ch: 分为两大区域，上层为智慧花园，下层为公众浴场——
t_en: The Palace is divided into two areas, with the Garden of Wisdom on the upper level, and a public bath on the lower level.

t_ch: 「天空在思量，海洋在狂放。」
t_en: "The sky contemplates while the ocean rages."

t_ch: 大地兽工坊
t_en: Dromas Workshop

t_ch: 早已融入城镇生活的大地兽们，告别了风餐露宿的野外生活。
t_en: The dromas said farewell to life in the wilderness, and grew accustomed to city life.

t_ch: 只消备好松软的新鲜红土，它便欣然前行三日三夜。
t_en: They happily march for three days and nights as long as there is soft and fresh red soil.

t_ch: 莫嫌人类又委屈了他物，若有巨兽的味蕾，泥土才是世间的极味。
t_en: Say not humanity wronged these beasts, for the taste buds of the dromas find soil to be the most wonderful flavor in the world.

t_ch: 负世泰坦
t_en: Worldbearing Titan

t_ch: 「在神话中永垂不朽的，必须在人世间灭亡。」
t_en: "What is immortal in legends must perish in the mortal realm."

t_ch: 最后的圣城在你眼前展开，阳光掠过负世泰坦之肩洒向人间，奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影——
t_en: The last holy city lays before you, as the sun, on the shoulder of the Worldbearing Titan, shines down on humanity. All Okhemans can catch a glimpse of the majestic silhouette...

t_ch: 「让我护卫众神的城邦，直到英雄再度降生此间。」
t_en: "Allow me to protect the city of the gods until the heroes' rebirth."

t_ch: 生命图书馆
t_en: Vitae Library

t_ch: 飞鸟衔来理性之种，眠于沃土之间；煌煌日光予之滋养，圣城始有花园。
t_en: A bird flew here and planted a seed of reason in the fertile soil. Nurtured by the blazing sun, the holy city saw its first garden grow.

t_ch: 「理性」以为年轮脉络，「智慧」内蕴生机盎然。
t_en: With reason as its rings, and wisdom as its vitality within.

t_ch: 纵世代破碎纷乱，此处传承不断，文明之火将续延。
t_en: The times may be tumultuous, but the legacy is passed down, and the fire of civilization keeps burning.

t_ch: 黄金裔的浴场
t_en: Chrysos Heir Bathhouse

t_ch: 泰坦的时代后，惟有黄金色被奉为神圣。
t_en: After the era of the Titans, only the color gold is considered holy.

t_ch: 悬于半空的浴池如是被万众仰望，在欢呼齐颂间他们凯旋。
t_en: The floating bath is looked up by the people, as the heroes return triumphantly among the chorus.

t_ch: 神选的英雄洗去尘途的疲惫，让感官沉入金血，在梦里触及未来的火光。
t_en: The chosen heroes wash away their fatigue and immerse their senses in the golden blood, touching the fire of the future in their dreams.

t_ch: 万民的浴场
t_en: Civilian Bathhouse

t_ch: 奥赫玛市民共浴的满溢主池。
t_en: The Overflowing Bath for residents of Okhema.

t_ch: 天神从不因享乐而自惭，它乘着海浪来到人间，令水泉流过的每一颗心溢出欢喜。
t_en: The godly never feels guilty of enjoyment. They ride the ocean waves to humanity, and fills every heart with water, passing through with joy.

t_ch: 于是，这里欢呼歌唱，热情漫舞，喝它个迷醉方休！
t_en: Thus, they sing jubilantly and dance passionately. Drink and be intoxicated!

t_ch: 命运重渊
t_en: Abyss of Fate

t_ch: 天边的墓碑，邪物的乐园，市民避讳看向的方位。
t_en: A tombstone at the end of the sky and a paradise of evil. The people do their best to not look in its general direction.

t_ch: 「嘘，静静地听，黑潮在疯笑。待太阳再度熄灭，它们要倾巢而出。」
t_en: "Shhh... Listen to the black tide's maniacal laugh. They will come out in droves when the sun goes down again."

t_ch: 奥赫玛的市集
t_en: Okhema Market

t_ch: 黑潮侵蚀圣城外围后，商铺纷纷迁至至此：百货杂陈，精工器物，雅俗书卷，琳琅满目。
t_en: After the black tide corroded the perimeters of the holy city, many merchants relocated here. One can find just about everything from finely crafted vessels or scholarly tomes to daily items and common reading materials.

t_ch: 偶有失落城邦的遗物现于市集，尽管多是最后的城邦自我慰藉的幻想。
t_en: The market occasionally sees relics from the lost cities, but they mostly turn out to be from the self-soothing fantasies of the last city.

t_ch: 浴场图书馆
t_en: Bathhouse Library

t_ch: 凡人在迷醉时最接近神明，便顺手借走一缕泰坦的灵光。
t_en: Mortals are closest to gods when they are intoxicated, and take the Titans' brilliance with them.

t_ch: 由此无数的哲思涌现，其精妙媲美「理性」之源。
t_en: The philosophies that stemmed from these moments are almost as intricate as the source of reason.

t_ch: 至少，那位女神如是所言。
t_en: At least that's what the goddess claimed.

t_ch: 夜幕中的斗技场
t_en: Eventide Arena

t_ch: 自那疯王的魂魄散逸，斗技的号角已长久沉寂。
t_en: The horn of martialism has not been sounded since the mad king's spirit scattered.

t_ch: 王权的更替久未再启，嗜血的土地在守候新的君临。
t_en: The throne has not seen a change of hands for a long time, and the land of bloodlust awaits its new ruler.

t_ch: 破败的征伐行道
t_en: Ruined Path of Conquest

t_ch: 昔日可容一方军阵的恢弘大道，今连一片落叶也难以负起。
t_en: The marvelous avenue that once held an army can barely bear the weight of a single fallen leaf these days.

t_ch: 尼卡多利的巨剑
t_en: Nikador's Greatsword
